body:
| | | I just got off the debate stage and I hope I made you proud.

Virginia has made huge progress in the last few years -- expanding Medicaid, raising the minimum wage, and abolishing the death penalty. We can’t afford to return to the broken politics of our past and risk the hard-won progress we’ve made by nominating Terry McAuliffe, who nearly lost the election in 2013 despite outspending his opponent 2 to 1.

Polling shows that my campaign has the momentum and excitement to win the primary AND the general. We just need the resources to make it happen.

**I’m personally asking you to send a contribution to my campaign tonight. Peter, can I count on you?**

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_debate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yItEt7UQpuYeCalSemnTXDY9m30FfCUsdG9_2M4Nfr1jnrgzPqw69pElwPJBfZgng5ufqdAhQ8RQfq7Zh64yXZYHbesLWKTFnFnB8nkY40howzVf-uDkADqV1fW1W9STVozI6Z6RCrqI11WAK50rARbn3-mj43d77z8az3viDih7HK6Q01iWryRM3SjFTumvtswaSwsAe5taypXTRt6Mk010jjnCJES8WukwjkSsLIrFN9IoZOtU2k0mNKYmKp0pIDCfXfQrMBlmQ1gyk4UJn7AsbGvSUN2R3jqVKt76eEgs2Ium87mQOAi8dilMzRXMFAK_BLRMZKt3q-DJGsi3QtlpDkmIquHcGLlOy-3EdSotu6aZ0uafZq6ous92shvOE/3bp/zlhmVle4SweI_xIlipklGQ/h0/1gM0_KK_In_LDxhB-Ddp-1_tiTN8r-PYnNnztlcD3ls)**

Thanks,

Jennifer

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz Just Said He's Keeping the Mask Mandate
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_keeping_mask_mandate&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Governor Walz is a tyrant. He believes he is above the law. And his so called plan to "follow the science" is the biggest con ever played on Minnesota. **Today Walz dialed up our allowable freedoms when he mentioned that there is a path later this summer to remove COVID restrictions. In other words, he is keeping his Emergency Powers and continuing to force you to wear a mask.** Well, I for one, have never followed his order from day one and will continue to not follow them. Why? Because in our Constitutional Republic, the orders of one man have no legal authority over me. Unfortunately, the judicial system has been weaponized against our rights for the last 14 months. It's created legal nightmares for people like Jane, Lisa, and Larvita. And it's put Lisa Hanson in handcuffs. In order to STOP our government and judicial system from infringing on our rights any longer, it's critically important to pass the Never Again Bill NOW!
### The good news is that a candidate just entered the race for Governor to oust Tim Walz. His name is Mike Marti and he signed the [Never Again Pledge](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_keeping_mask_mandate&n=2) this afternoon!
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_keeping_mask_mandate&n=3) [Thank you Mike Marti](mailto:press@mikemarti.com) for pledging to stop the tyranny and ensure it Never Happens Again. He joins Mayor Mike Murphy who also signed the same pledge. Scott Jensen still refuses to sign the Never Again Pledge.
### Now for some bad news...
Weak Republicans are ready to sell you out on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. They are ready to give up everything to Governor Walz in the budget before the Never Again Bill is passed. That's outrageous!!! Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka is cozying up to tyrant Walz right now, meeting behind closed doors to determine how to spend $54 Billion of YOUR money. They are going to fund the same government that is being used to attack our beloved businesses and enforce these anti-science, anti-liberty restrictions. **Don't let Gazelka cut a final deal with Democrats. DEMAND that your state senator REFUSES to vote for a final budget deal UNTIL the Never Again Bill is passed into law.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_keeping_mask_mandate&n=4 "WHO REPRESENTS ME") [WHO REPRESENTS ME](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_keeping_mask_mandate&n=5)
---
**These final days of the legislative session are too important for us to remain quiet. We MUST DEMAND they listen to us.**
**
No Deals. No Budget until the Never Again Bill is Passed into Law!!!**
[**I can't stress how important these calls and emails are from you. They do work. But if you don't feel comfortable making the call, please contribute $25, $50 or $100 to our large, paid phone calling and ad campaigns IMMEDIATELY. We MUST keep the pressure on these weak Republicans.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_keeping_mask_mandate&n=6)
Let's win this battle for our children and future generations of Minnesotans! NEVER AGAIN!
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_keeping_mask_mandate&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_keeping_mask_mandate&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_keeping_mask_mandate&n=9), software for leaders.

* **I 'm a common-sense, Pro-Trump Republican running against Nancy Pelosi's puppet, Congresswoman Stephanie Murphy (FL-07). **

* **I spent 7 years in Iraq and 2 years in Afghanistan fighting Islamic Terrorists that want to destroy our way of life and our freedoms.**

* **While serving abroad, I was struck twice - once with an IED and once with an Iranian explosive projectile.**

* **I am a father, business owner, and - like you - am very concerned about the direction of our country.**

* **President Trump appointed me to be an advisor at the Department of Defense to help advance our noble American values.**

_**The Radical Left fears people like me and you because we refuse to give in to their cancel culture, their hatred of American values, and their fear mongering.**_

**I am running in one of the most competitive congressional districts** in the country and I need your help to fight back against George Soros' billions, Mike Bloomberg's attempted takeover of Florida, Nancy Pelosi's socialist fundraising machine, and the mainstream media's hatred of my fellow conservative veteran, _**Ron DeSantis**_.

[**_Can I count on your support to help launch my campaign?_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57325300:JtLjJRuNW:m:1:3206719985:9F98BF1544F0B152FB54106C2C9ACB9E:r)

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Our progress is on the ballot this November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/MqWn-W38EUeZjQM7LwQp8Uz8JpGERVse3KvEatNj7rk=/wwlW-_vgNJ1lgryiZ50gm-EpkbRwa8c4ZrQPClJXEGM=)
---
Friend, Tomorrow, the Virginia Republicans will convene to select its nominees for the statewide offices in November. No matter who they choose, we know that the prevailing candidates will be far-right extremists who are out of touch with our mainstream Virginia values. **[Our progress is on the ballot this November so please contribute as generously as you can today so we can keep Virginia blue.](https://act.myngp.com/el/MqWn-W38EUeZjQM7LwQp8Uz8JpGERVse3KvEatNj7rk=/77DLnkaTCRCKhqo8R4Y_aT5ed8TRDCWAX93G-ZoStbc=)** Under Democratic leadership in Virginia, we have passed historic gun safety legislation, repealed medically-unnecessary restrictions on women's healthcare, repealed racially discriminatory language in the Virginia Code, made Election Day a state holiday, and made Virginia the first Southern state to provide sweeping anti-discrimination protections for LGBTQ people. We are proud to be the third state in the nation to pass a ban on "no knock" warrants, and we have made monumental progress on criminal justice reform by becoming the first state in the South to abolish the death penalty. [_**To put it simply - we have to defeat them in November. There 's just too much at stake. I hope you can join me in the fight today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/MqWn-W38EUeZjQM7LwQp8Uz8JpGERVse3KvEatNj7rk=/77DLnkaTCRCKhqo8R4Y_aT5ed8TRDCWAX93G-ZoStbc=) Let's keep the progress going. \- Ralph Northam

name: Councilmember Kenyatta Johnson
subject: Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
body:
Dear Friend,

It is a privilege to announce my endorsement of Judge Lori Dumas for Commonwealth Court.

Judge Lori Dumas has dedicated over 19 years to service as a sitting judge in the Philadelphia Court of Common Pleas. Her devotion to fight for and protect the children and families of Philadelphia is one of the many reasons why she is well-suited to serve our great Commonwealth.

Judge Dumas has worked tirelessly to fight against systems of juvenile human trafficking by creating the First Judicial District’s Juvenile Human Trafficking Court in Philadelphia. Her outstanding leadership and dedication to service are just a few reasons that she would make an excellent Judge on the Pennsylvania Commonwealth Court.

[Can you help support with $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can help with to Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28801974/284381002/1565234157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGQ0MzRkMi00MWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xAAdQEHf1v6R7OTuo_aE0mWwh0JWawI2yXaRirVcrnY=&emci=aeb12830-38af-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=94d434d2-41af-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1353776)

I also encourage you to visit [judgedumas2021.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28801978/284381006/391981511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGQ0MzRkMi00MWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xAAdQEHf1v6R7OTuo_aE0mWwh0JWawI2yXaRirVcrnY=&emci=aeb12830-38af-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=94d434d2-41af-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1353776) to find out more about her campaign.

name: Team Hern
subject: FWD: National Small Business Week
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/39ad7ca26330a185/a2fa69c365a4aa71c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, We hope you saw Kevin’s email earlier recognizing the thousands of hardworking Oklahomans who are part of our vital small business community. Small businesses are the backbone of our economy; owning and operating a small business is the embodiment of the American Dream! _However, that dream is being threatened for too many citizens, thanks to the ultra-left policies being put into place by the Biden Administration. _ Joe Biden has famously said on many occasions that the “rich” should “pay their fair share,” but his proposed tax policies are going to hit every single working American in one way or another. They will rip apart small businesses, and keep families from passing down their legacy to their children. Kevin is fighting hard against these dream-killing progressive regulations and tax increases, but he can’t do it without your support. Please RUSH a donation right now to help Kevin in his work against these tax increases and FOR small businesses across our district and state! [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/39ad7ca26330a185/d35c8f0eaf1865fdc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [CHIP IN $10 NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/39ad7ca26330a185/a9c577a9330c8735c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [CHIP IN $25 NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/39ad7ca26330a185/dc11950685991fc8c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/39ad7ca26330a185/c7014a7ab0590067c3d6b838967d376c/34143) **Help keep the dream alive for Americans who are currently running small businesses, and those who aspire to one day own their own little slice of commerce.[Rush your support right now. >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/39ad7ca26330a185/2ba28ba13bf38e55c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** \- Team Hern | |
---
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
From: Kevin Hern
Subject: National Small Business Week
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/39ad7ca26330a185/c756491354a99359c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
Peter,

It’s National Small Business Week, and I am deeply proud of every Oklahoman involved in owning and operating a small business. There are over 340k small businesses alone in our great state, employing over 700k people!

They are a vital part of our district and state, and I hope you will join me in saluting those who are helping to fuel our economy.

**I know from experience exactly how tenacious, innovative, and driven a person has to be in order to open and run a small business. **

Sometimes people poke fun at me for owning a McDonalds franchise. They’ve even nicknamed me “McCongressman.” But the truth is that I spent 10 years flipping burgers in order to save up the money to purchase my first franchise in the restaurant system. I worked every part of the restaurant to learn all the ins and outs, and picked up any odd job on the side to save every penny I could. I’m so proud of what I was able to build with a dream and an unbeatable work ethic, and I’m proud of every American who has done the same.

**I know the grit and determination it takes to be a small business owner, and I want to take a moment to recognize and honor all the hardworking Oklahomans who make up our small business community this week, and every single day. **

If you are involved in a small business and everything that entails, thank you from the bottom of my heart.

Sincerely,
Kevin Hern
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/39ad7ca26330a185/bc26052ea64a5340c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/39ad7ca26330a185/9998859c5c198d1fc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

body:
I want to make sure you saw this email from PA Sen. Sharif Street, because I want you to remember when he was just starting out in this campaign. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28805583/284396408/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjgxYjFjMi00YWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNUmUZJDIQBDa77Vd921MlDW504bKW-Y0dzJG55Woj4=&emci=6bf0466e-d1ad-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=7681b1c2-4aaf-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=15053672) | Peter, I want to make sure you saw this email from PA Sen. Sharif Street, because I want you to remember when he was just starting out in this campaign. I truly believe that Sharif is the best candidate for Senate, and I’m in full support of his exploration into running this race -- but I have to be honest, __**running for the Senate in Pennsylvania is one of the hardest jobs in politics today.**__ [**That’s why I’m hoping you’ll donate even just $5 towards his campaign. His warmth, dedication, and experience make him the ideal person to lead our state.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28805585/284396409/900906502?refcode=E8493-20210507-RamadanKicker-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjgxYjFjMi00YWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNUmUZJDIQBDa77Vd921MlDW504bKW-Y0dzJG55Woj4=) It’s not lost on me that he would make history just by the nature of who he is -- he would not only be the FIRST Black Senator from Pennsylvania, but would be our Commonwealth’s first Muslim Senator as well. It’s time for a change, and Sharif Street represents that hope for a better future. [**So please, donate today and then read his message to his supporters below.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28805586/284396412/900906502?refcode=E8493-20210507-RamadanKicker-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjgxYjFjMi00YWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNUmUZJDIQBDa77Vd921MlDW504bKW-Y0dzJG55Woj4=) Yours, Wasi Muhammad, activist **\----- Forwarded Message -----** Because of COVID-19 related health concerns, last year was the first time in over 2 decades I was unable to fast for Ramadan. Instead, I provided food for those in need, as suggested by the Quran when one is unable to fast, and watched all the good that resulted. Although I am fasting this year, I decided to continue that fight against food insecurity by committing to provide food for 200 families in Philadelphia each day for the 30 days of Ramadan. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28805587/284396413/900906502?refcode=E8492-20210506-RamadanVolunteering-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjgxYjFjMi00YWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNUmUZJDIQBDa77Vd921MlDW504bKW-Y0dzJG55Woj4=) In doing so, I met so many wonderful volunteers and had deep conversations with our neighbors about COVID-19, jobs, our economy, and the tragic cycle of poverty too many in our communities succumb to. This experience made me even more committed to being the best advocate I can be for my friends and neighbors across our Commonwealth. There are too many folks suffering needlessly because their leaders couldn’t take the decisive action required. _**This is exactly why I launched my exploratory committee into running for Pennsylvania Senate.**_ This race is one of the most important in the country for Democrats hoping to keep the Senate blue, so we need the strongest possible leader to coalesce the people of Pennsylvania to come together and fight for our future. I want to lead that fight. [**However, I first need to tour Pennsylvania from Erie to York; from Philadelphia to Pittsburgh to listen to the people and hear what issues mean the most to them. Will you help me do that by donating $25 towards my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28805589/284396415/900906502?refcode=E8492-20210506-RamadanVolunteering-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjgxYjFjMi00YWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNUmUZJDIQBDa77Vd921MlDW504bKW-Y0dzJG55Woj4=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28805591/284396417/900906502?refcode=E8492-20210506-RamadanVolunteering-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjgxYjFjMi00YWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNUmUZJDIQBDa77Vd921MlDW504bKW-Y0dzJG55Woj4=) Thank you for standing by my side. Yours, Sen. Sharif Street

Sharif Street, because I want you to remember when he was just starting out in this campaign. | | Peter, I want to make sure you saw this email from PA Sen. Sharif Street, because I want you to remember when he was just starting out in this campaign. I truly believe that Sharif is the best candidate for Senate, and I’m in full support of his exploration into running this race -- but I have to be honest, running for the Senate in Pennsylvania is one of the hardest jobs in politics today. = It’s not lost on me that he would make history just by the nature of who he is -- he would not only be the FIRST Black Senator from Pennsylvania, but would be our Commonwealth’s first Muslim Senator as well. It’s time for a change, and Sharif Street represents that hope for a better future. = Yours, Wasi Muhammad, activist \----- Forwarded Message ----- Because of COVID-19 related health concerns, last year was the first time in over 2 decades I was unable to fast for Ramadan. Instead, I provided food for those in need, as suggested by the Quran when one is unable to fast, and watched all the good that resulted. Although I am fasting this year, I decided to continue that fight against food insecurity by committing to provide food for 200 families in Philadelphia each day for the 30 days of Ramadan. = In doing so, I met so many wonderful volunteers and had deep conversations with our neighbors about COVID-19, jobs, our economy, and the tragic cycle of poverty too many in our communities succumb to. This experience made me even more committed to being the best advocate I can be for my friends and neighbors across our Commonwealth. There are too many folks suffering needlessly because their leaders couldn’t take the decisive action required. This is exactly why I launched my exploratory committee into running for Pennsylvania Senate. This race is one of the most important in the country for Democrats hoping to keep the Senate blue, so we need the strongest possible leader to coalesce the people of Pennsylvania to come together and fight for our future. I want to lead that fight. = = Thank you for standing by my side. Yours, Sen. Sharif Street Senator Sharif Street has assembled an Exploratory Committee comprised of over 100 leaders from across the Commonwealth representing a diversity of experiences to help him develop a winning policy agenda that'll flip Pennsylvania's Senate seat from red-to-blue! **, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to receive only our most important emails or you can unsubscribe at the link here . = = Sharif is the son of John Street, a hotdog vendor who became Mayor of Philadelphia, and Helen Street-Mosee, a retired school teacher. They raised him and his 3 siblings in North Philadelphia where he now lives with his wife, April. Will you help him make history by = | PAID FOR BY SHARIF STREET FOR PA SHARIF STREET FOR PA PO BOX 28729 658 N. 63RD STREET PHILADELPHIA, PA 19151 United States

Help22 has made it our mission to deliver the counseling, coaching and therapy our veterans need to remain hopeful that they can overcome the challenges they face after serving.

Each day, 22 veterans die from suicide... simply because **they don’t have the inspiration, insight and support they need** to overcome the psychological trauma they suffered defending freedom.

Help22 was founded to recruit life coaches, counselors, therapists, social workers, psychologists and psychiatrists nationwide to volunteer on the 22nd of each month to give free care to America’s veterans. It’s a direct way to deliver hope and healing to those who delivered for us.

[**We need your help to reach the most vulnerable veterans in America.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/oAIpa7qzXoamMwAAtxRKeeBq5PEuajdq0zcITv_NCzHCHpieBI5z03bVxtfNhcMNcto35K3iiydOgadg-bA63S2jMD2dEsRCx6alwVJ_akPiToTVe58Sos3p9k5ob05zKMxi9qS9rK5cp5DrKWjLtSrava4fv5lQ7f3gwB4fm-wvcUynmezC-d-F3oM1HgLhWHI5h9H1t1erkAbnQk0H4z7z8DJcYGNCmFAe8ZDeyvhH2FS9J0h48I3Ft-AU-_PrUWUH_87TxQoJWvyHyhbGCFS_thNvPjrl1j3bBatYd3i8LkI-fiYVUPMx)

[**Will you help us provide this life saving service? Please contribute a tax-deductible $11 to help us reach out to 1,000 more veterans.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/U9yvXOSDvjKAoTpIlqN7oG1cmA9baEOyPtxUMMJDbvKk1oXA10xbmfFRpS8OQKvge66yZ48ncsZqKB2msDzGibMX33iq-o7oUpPdkcbgPcqEuor0grL3HVltGKij7hpGhkTTbbr636f-vgVCsftttX-7RL2_nxDMrAgpoi0pUMQwhhONRLrnhgi41Ecih8z6Z00zvEXoSsFe0QbDPPR1DmYmQ3gFx-eFVU9nsliiEB202o78g3C7np-7iIugQQQ4BuHQu5bRBPCHGYc4h-HRT9nnkVALkAhdMPtfc8Opj4UJx-bWCkoL4ayZ)

Thank you for your help.

Commander Kirk Lippold
US Navy (Ret.)

clean_body: Right now, Pelosi and the rest of the Democrats are working through the night to reshape America into a socialist's dream. ** . == Friend, The Far Left is at it again. Right now, Nancy Pelosi and the rest of the Radical Left are working day and night to transform America into a socialist's dream. Biden's most recent proposals now have a staggering $6 trillion price tag. Clearly he and the rest of the Far Left are comfortable with spending YOUR money to buy whatever pet project they want. And that includes expanding their socialist agenda. If the Left has their way and expands socialism in America, that means... ❌ Huge tax hikes ❌ Out-of-control spending ❌ Government takeovers ❌ Fewer opportunities We have to send a message to the out-of-touch politicians in Washington that we do NOT want socialism in Orange County or in America. == | ==** \-- California Republican Alerts Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativevictory2020.net powered by

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PQumD0ZWPUQNtoXQ6a4IaxiMQtG2nCwWEFqX7ngobbhG1WlUKUOpw29LE6F96ZcA1HP4mbaA2WFAAg8r6RXJrmGRmyQcQ45-ZSDfWINMZzJtqawX1OUa0WMU461GttCXcHp-DnYo_8U=&c=BWd1B_qaKYlVI-oaT3XK6VRGk4Vr2KQLcblnWsIlA1U04AFHTtEGww==&ch=G8TkD74tzg8iEgzccMqyhMZ9-HWd_a4mE6gAem_XNFQN7EdOyV9paw==).

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Planned Parenthood stole from YOU!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Planned Parenthood illegally stole $80 million of taxpayer dollars to use for their abortion services
|
---
| | |
Planned Parenthood illegally stole $80 million of taxpayer dollars to use for their abortion services, Friend.

**This is appalling.** The Paycheck Protection Program was not meant to fund abortions. I cannot believe that it was abused in this manner. I am shocked and disappointed.

That is why Planned Parenthood must return the $80 million dollars they **STOLE** from taxpayers. We have opened up our petition, DEMANDING they return the money. _**[Will you take 2 seconds to sign it -- it'd mean a ton if we could reach 10,000 signatures!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ODWKA6cAw8L5YKhiW3aOBG5Dj3JmWb1RgakA5CDw1uboRv9AqOjDuRO31HtHNYNyTj8RGpz306O6Fk2Qhb9G0RoJUawfpvw1qEavOEpofFvAfXsr7pwJhzpsOLSF7x-usBDD_v3dFp-WGkusuERJCrXcq5pyqPWkdB0dy2sAfO71Q7sZlQhRuo2AuvoHseEwxDwAs65f7bBxr4v44q0Ap6xvNVd3Le3Z7jYzRoy8pTo5laThEgcr6g46sEYFauGm2WXmVxjryf1eU6AXstkr0YBjXa5QjSBeqzVg_1-8fyIVAolvfesF00XJqCQXthen-v5D07lGxyEtXOEEEX8rD6whNQ7UdJRN6HgnVvL-5SUm-BzTN8CR3bF_wI1x3E0HZ5-LKxjm2BXsyUHYHAvMIw==&c=lfkLMSUP7Ku3Cf0PTA9Shxhb2mhaoqouYJUfYBeFLRq1hZLBgDd0ug==&ch=dBS_0akeyaF93ThTHgu-5Hm-A0vRYnCyMLv8TyNKkCdHqdOS7_EB1A== "Will you take 2 seconds to sign it -- it’d mean a ton if we could reach 10,000 signatures!")**_

Peter — In just a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to make a contribution toward my campaign for Lt. Governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28809358/284411819/2006474955?refcode=hla-em-210507-lme&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGZlZmQwZS01NGFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=we2shOhMlwrr1aN2tEDG5W6X_K_93VT-MmCsk3Iv_PQ=)** But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this request is so important — especially today. I was 24 and working at a gas station when I found out I was pregnant — and I didn’t have access to health care. For my son and I, Medicaid saved our lives. After my son was born, I worked hard to complete my degree and got a job as a cyber security specialist with the Department of Homeland Security. But still, I found myself struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over my family’s head. My story isn’t unique. Too many Virginians have been left out by the system that keeps working families like mine on the menu while folks at the top sit comfortably at the table. **So, I threw my hat in the ring and ran for office to change that.** I was elected to the House of Delegates in 2017 and I’m so proud of what we’ve accomplished for working families since then — from finally ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment to expanding medicaid for 500,000 Virginians to abolishing the death penalty to legalizing marijuana. But still, many Virginia families are struggling in the wake of this public health crisis to afford prescriptions and put food on the table. There is still so much work ahead of us. **Peter, I’m humbly asking for your support today because I believe that I can continue to build on our progressive agenda and make a difference for so many working families as Virginia’s next Lt. Governor. So, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford toward our campaign? name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: On the Road Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Last week Willie Nelson turned 88 and this week his classic “On the Road Again” was the unofficial theme song of the Indiana Republican Party. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470438?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**On the Road Again**_ Last week Willie Nelson turned 88 and this week his classic “[On the Road Again](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cfd3159e7e&e=1acd9bb3d6)” was the unofficial theme song of the Indiana Republican Party. I was on the road and visited with party leaders and supporters in Kosciusko, Warsaw, Elkhart, St. Joseph, and Howard Counties. This culminated with watching Governor Holcomb help kickoff Opening Night for the South Bend Cubs, the Cubs' first game in over a year. Traveling, meeting with Hoosier Republicans, and safely watching a baseball game in a fantastic stadium with fans are all reminders that, because of Republican leadership in Indiana, we’re returning to normal.

We were on the road to talk about some of the big wins from this legislative session, and make no mistake about it, there are a lot of BIG wins. Under Governor Holcomb and the Republican supermajorities in the state legislature, Indiana expanded school choice, paid down debt, is paying cash for capital improvement projects, made record investments in education and economic development and did all this while balancing the budget, maintaining a healthy reserve and triple-A credit rating and keeping our tax and regulatory burden low. These are real results for real people and are only possible because of real Republican leadership. Republicans will keep delivering for Hoosiers and I’ll keep getting on the road again to share the good news and meet with the grassroots leaders throughout our state who’ve made the Indiana Republican Party the dominate political organization in our state.

Thanks Kyle

**Photo** : _Chairman Hupfer visits with Howard County GOP Chairwoman Jennifer Jack earlier this week in Kokomo_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Building One Indiana for All**_ **Governor Holcomb** addressed fans at Opening Night for the South Bend Cubs. This is a significant step in our state's continued reopening, because this is the first minor league baseball game played in South Bend in over a year! Thanks to the nearly 2 million Hoosiers who have been fully vaccinated and **Governor Holcomb's** data driven leadership, we're getting back to normal life in a safe and healthy way.

On Thursday, **Governor Holcomb** joined executives from Milwaukee Tool to cut the ribbon and celebrate the grand opening of the company’s new tool service hub in Greenwood. To support its new Indiana operations, Milwaukee Tool plans to create more than 450 new jobs and has already hired 120 employees toward that goal. Thanks to **Governor Holcomb's** pro-growth, business friendly leadership, we've broke jobs and economic development records year after year.

_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb and South Bend Cubs owner Andrew Berlin attend opening night of the Cubs’ 2021 season in South Bend on Tuesday._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Victoria Spartz Announces Reelection**_ Victoria Spartz has announced that she will run for another term in congress representing Indiana's 5th District.
_**"There is a lot at stake for our country and I believe I can be valuable to my constituents and fight for good policy solutions badly needed for our nation." -Victoria Spartz**_
Read her full announcement here: [https://mailchi.mp/spartzforcongress/announcement](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d08ce8db37&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**READI Grants**_ Governor Holcomb today announced the launch of the Indiana Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI). This transformational initiative will dedicate $500 million in state appropriations to promote strategic investments that will make Indiana a magnet for talent and economic growth.

Gov. Holcomb announced the concept of READI in his [State of the State address](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d3eb0807f4&e=1acd9bb3d6) in January, and the Indiana General Assembly funded the program as a part of its new biennial budget. READI is expected to attract at least $2 billion of local public, private and philanthropic match funding that will propel investment in Indiana’s quality of place, quality of life, and quality of opportunity.
_**“READI will lead the nation in encouraging regional collaboration, and it will equip Indiana regions with the tools and resources needed to implement strategic investments in quality of place and innovation, creating a once-in-a-generation opportunity to transform our state for residents and for future generations of Hoosiers.” -Governor Holcomb**_
---
|
---
| _**Session Highlights**_ It’s been just over a week since the Indiana General Assembly recessed the 2021 legislative session. It was a **transformational session** , the positive impact of which will reverberate for years.
**_“We’re investing in education at an all-time record high level,” Governor Eric Holcomb._**
When it comes to education, the 2021 legislative session:
* **_Fully funded_** K-12 public schools
* **In fact, 50% of the state budget goes to K-12 education**
* This supports in-person and virtual learning due to COVID-19.
* It’s worth noting that Governor Holcomb **_fulfilled his commitment to maintain 100% of education funding_** throughout pandemic.
* Expanded the best-in-the nation **_school choice program._**
* Now covers about **_48,000_** Hoosier students
* The [Wall Street Journal](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=28a939eaa0&e=1acd9bb3d6) says **_“Once again Hoosiers are leading the way in establishing an education system that gives parents and children a choice.”_**
* Established **_record levels_** of investment in K-12 education.
* **_Added $1.9 billion in NEW money to K-12 education_**
* Fulfills Gov. Holcomb’s [teacher compensation commission’s](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f0dd463cd8&e=1acd9bb3d6) recommendation of $600 million increased investment in public schools.
* Increased K-12 tuition support by 9.1%, or $1.03 billion, over the biennium.
* 92% of Indiana students are in traditional public schools and **_[93% of education funding goes to those schools](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1fabb587a9&e=1acd9bb3d6)._**
* Recommends starting teacher salaries at $40,000.
* This follows through on another recommendation from **Gov. Holcomb’s [teacher compensation commission](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9de4ad6033&e=1acd9bb3d6).**
* Requires schools to direct 45% of tuition support to teacher pay.

_**“The raises for educators, increased education funding.... are all game changers,” Governor Eric Holcomb.**_

* The 2021 legislative session is also paying down debts. In education this means:
* Paying down $600 million to the teacher retirement fund, further easing district-level responsibilities to the fund.
* Continues Governor Holcomb’s **expansion of broadband** by investing $250 million in connectivity.

**_“In the 21st century, high quality, affordable broadband is essential to the success of all Hoosiers and our state,” Governor Eric Holcomb._**
Governor Holcomb and legislative leaders are investing in students and teachers, paying down debt, and supporting Hoosier families. **_When Republicans lead, students, parents, and teachers win._**
---
|
---

clean_body: Last week Willie Nelson turned 88 and this week his classic “On the Road Again” was the unofficial theme song of the Indiana Republican Party. | | | | | | | | On the Road Again Last week Willie Nelson turned 88 and this week his classic “” was the unofficial theme song of the Indiana Republican Party. I was on the road and visited with party leaders and supporters in Kosciusko, Warsaw, Elkhart, St. Joseph, and Howard Counties. This culminated with watching Governor Holcomb help kickoff Opening Night for the South Bend Cubs, the Cubs' first game in over a year. Traveling, meeting with Hoosier Republicans, and safely watching a baseball game in a fantastic stadium with fans are all reminders that, because of Republican leadership in Indiana, we’re returning to normal. We were on the road to talk about some of the big wins from this legislative session, and make no mistake about it, there are a lot of BIG wins. Under Governor Holcomb and the Republican supermajorities in the state legislature, Indiana expanded school choice, paid down debt, is paying cash for capital improvement projects, made record investments in education and economic development and did all this while balancing the budget, maintaining a healthy reserve and triple-A credit rating and keeping our tax and regulatory burden low. These are real results for real people and are only possible because of real Republican leadership. Republicans will keep delivering for Hoosiers and I’ll keep getting on the road again to share the good news and meet with the grassroots leaders throughout our state who’ve made the Indiana Republican Party the dominate political organization in our state. Thanks Kyle Photo : Chairman Hupfer visits with Howard County GOP Chairwoman Jennifer Jack earlier this week in Kokomo | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Building One Indiana for All Governor Holcomb addressed fans at Opening Night for the South Bend Cubs. This is a significant step in our state's continued reopening, because this is the first minor league baseball game played in South Bend in over a year! Thanks to the nearly 2 million Hoosiers who have been fully vaccinated and Governor Holcomb's data driven leadership, we're getting back to normal life in a safe and healthy way. On Thursday, Governor Holcomb joined executives from Milwaukee Tool to cut the ribbon and celebrate the grand opening of the company’s new tool service hub in Greenwood. To support its new Indiana operations, Milwaukee Tool plans to create more than 450 new jobs and has already hired 120 employees toward that goal. body:
We’re putting kids first in Indiana! Read more >>

Hoosier Republican,

The last year has been incredibly difficult for many people across the country, but in Indiana, we are so proud of the way Hoosiers rose to the challenge to overcome — especially when it came to our kids.

We were able maintain 100% education funding through the pandemic and subsequent budget cuts, with 50% of the general fund going to K-12 education.

Now we’re going even further to invest in our future. We just made record-setting investments in education during our recent legislative session, including allocating $1.9 billion in NEW money for our K-12 students!

Hoosiers know what’s important, and that’s our children.

We need your help to keep investing in our future. The radical left is determined to bring a blue wave to Indiana so they can divert funds to special interest projects instead of towards educating our future Hoosier leaders.

Please chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can right now to keep Indiana RED and keeping putting our kids first! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-education-2?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_Education2_050721&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=4bca74b5d4&mc_eid=UNIQID)

With your help, we can keep supporting lawmakers who won’t waver in their dedication to invest in our future.

Thanks,
Team IN GOP

body:
Add your name to my “Get Hunter Biden Out of China!” Demand to the White House today! | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=6ddada7971ae44a3ad966d9e9033ae90&_e=eURyLH0biG4q-r_y9qVO7HscTcPCEiAzByiZexKJc7N2SbM0uHLQ-zsxUg96oo0b15UDOaY5sM5T5ZHIRZMkLuzG1-qAtf562L7dDreHCHONoOXujFI9cF7i7opEwo8eJGSkCYgW1k_mp0aRo6h0r3oJkfyLNnCglmftMVV3Sbpdf1D_LH7ICX-8TeXmNw8DsbVfQ2CuBKmgHJKV5rrtnLmqvKm4hvgpKh1fwb3J3001aHhXjTrLMtPADCHBYCvBkoxxwG6-RtlKWB3Eq1AMJabco3AUyXYUS_n3-NV33lQbx2NbsNYfiitgvtkkzJTdqH6U1fzIJdj2yCKRX4OyOAr9MAsQ7BYndzyW1pdpnmb4nrQZcjjvwkkWoH5xUzON66Rr_xWYv70GF3r6WCIIPI9sfWp2q-tSzNGgUb86gJXx7cpizQizKDNqhvmc0oUCnuxPdNUb-AGZi50jP12xH2ePpxMw6s05HhmaNnUF141v0ASy9Atf-c1YZLHs1CsdyxDmCoxyG9xsnRfN36sQyw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative.

When **Joe Biden** was running for President last year, he insisted that _“no one in my family... will have any business relationship with anyone that relates to a foreign corporation or a foreign country. Period. Period. End of story.”_

Fellow Conservative, we all know talk is cheap, so shouldn’t now-President Biden insist that his clear-cut pronouncement is actually true?

It seems that once again, Joe Biden was willing to make assurances to the voters that just aren’t so - because his son **Hunter Biden** _still_ holds a stake in a Chinese equity firm - now over 100 days into his father’s term.

That’s why I sent a letter to President Biden reminding him of his very own words, that his son continues to have financial interests in Communist China, and that this obvious conflict of interest is exactly what he vowed would not occur.

Fellow Conservative, as President of the United States, it is critical to avoid any appearance of conflict of interests with foreign governments, **particularly adversaries such as China.**

That’s why Joe Biden needs to tell his son to immediately divest in any and all foreign investments - **_“period,” “end of story”_** - and **[I need your help to make sure he knows it and is held accountable for his promises.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=6ddada7971ae44a3ad966d9e9033ae90&_e=eURyLH0biG4q-r_y9qVO7HscTcPCEiAzByiZexKJc7N2SbM0uHLQ-zsxUg96oo0b15UDOaY5sM5T5ZHIRZMkLuzG1-qAtf562L7dDreHCHONoOXujFI9cF7i7opEwo8eJGSkCYgW1k_mp0aRo6h0r3oJkfyLNnCglmftMVV3Sbpdf1D_LH7ICX-8TeXmNw8DsbVfQ2CuBKmgHJKV5rrtnLmqvKm4hvgpKh1fwb3J3001aHhXjTrLMtPADCHBYCvBkoxxwG6-RtlKWB3Eq1AMJabco3AUyXYUS_n3-NV33lQbx2NbsNYfiitgvtkkzJTdaZNMppUNw95E4nVb6IJWRJGdHphvvgd8Y_2NGBwRh8gyk4YHwN3SKHIQGaoRRpSKa_4En3qJPqHApftCqVosuzy-kv_7bVZT1dAj2-QxGl33Lbi3iz337AucoAQD4K4UwP9C06BFNEpgTDujuO9PTH56-Q67PAaA6kVlroU92TkszOoNBKJHBFZMWyN7vfFDZiYjtSinf6i4iUoUcWtzPA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Add your name to my “Get Hunter Biden Out of China!” Demand to the White House today! | Fellow Conservative. When Joe Biden was running for President last year, he insisted that “no one in my family... will have any business relationship with anyone that relates to a foreign corporation or a foreign country. Period. Period. End of story.” Fellow Conservative, we all know talk is cheap, so shouldn’t now-President Biden insist that his clear-cut pronouncement is actually true? It seems that once again, Joe Biden was willing to make assurances to the voters that just aren’t so - because his son Hunter Biden still holds a stake in a Chinese equity firm - now over 100 days into his father’s term. That’s why I sent a letter to President Biden reminding him of his very own words, that his son continues to have financial interests in Communist China, and that this obvious conflict of interest is exactly what he vowed would not occur. Fellow Conservative, as President of the United States, it is critical to avoid any appearance of conflict of interests with foreign governments, particularly adversaries such as China. That’s why Joe Biden needs to tell his son to immediately divest in any and all foreign investments - “period,” “end of story” - and Will you please join me now and Fellow Conservative, President Biden needs to follow through and live up to his own avowed requirements of his family, Thank you, Fellow Conservative - Thank you, Senator Steve Daines | Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: I’m fighting back against Amazon’s union-busting. Will you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Greedy corporate giants like Amazon are making out like bandits while their workers suffer.
#

Unions built the middle-class by giving workers the power of banding together and advocating for fair wages, better benefits, and safe working conditions.
But that's all under attack. Greedy corporate giants like Amazon are making out like bandits while their workers suffer.
And when workers attempt to organize, they're met with the same hostile union-busting tactics we saw from Amazon in Alabama last month.
**So it's time for Congress to step up. We cannot continue to let working families get left behind.**
[Will you join me in urging the U.S. Senate to pass the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act? We need to show this bill has overwhelming support, especially from folks in Pennsylvania, so I hope you'll sign my petition >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28812521/284422681/-18859834?refcode=em210507-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGQ0ZjUzNC01Y2FmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AnFbMcxrOIqAgeV1nWTfXWcDJHg6mCWSmWAMx4cnT4c=&emci=1d91f83e-59af-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=08d4f534-5caf-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=18034979)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28812525/284422685/-18859834?refcode=em210507-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGQ0ZjUzNC01Y2FmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AnFbMcxrOIqAgeV1nWTfXWcDJHg6mCWSmWAMx4cnT4c=&emci=1d91f83e-59af-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=08d4f534-5caf-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=18034979)**
Thanks to the power of collective bargaining, working people in this country have had a pathway to financial stability for over a century.
But with employers' _(and state governments')_ increasing hostility toward them, the number of unionized workers is declining.
In 1980, nearly a third of all workers in Pennsylvania were members of a union. But today, union membership has fallen to less than 15%. Congress must act to reverse that trend and put us on a path to rebuilding a thriving middle class.
Since the beginning of the pandemic, working families have had to confront unprecedented challenges.
Ensuring workers' rights to advocate for better wages and safe working conditions is the only way for us to build a robust economic recovery in these uncertain times.
The PRO Act will help accomplish that by updating outdated national labor laws to strengthen collective bargaining efforts and expand protections for more workers.
It passed with bipartisan support in the House, and it's time for the Senate to send it to President Biden's desk.
**We applauded the workers who built this country and got us through the pandemic. Now it’s time for us to do right by them.**
[If you agree, will you join me today in speaking up for working families and urge the Senate to pass the PRO Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28812527/284422688/-18859834?refcode=em210507-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGQ0ZjUzNC01Y2FmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AnFbMcxrOIqAgeV1nWTfXWcDJHg6mCWSmWAMx4cnT4c=&emci=1d91f83e-59af-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=08d4f534-5caf-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=18034979)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28812529/284422690/-18859834?refcode=em210507-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGQ0ZjUzNC01Y2FmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AnFbMcxrOIqAgeV1nWTfXWcDJHg6mCWSmWAMx4cnT4c=&emci=1d91f83e-59af-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=08d4f534-5caf-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=18034979)**
Thank you for taking action today,
Malcolm

body:
Peter -- I'm teaming up with Matt Gaetz for an America First
Rally tonight! I wanted to pass along the link so you can watch
live, starting at 7pm!
You can watch on Right Side Broadcasting
Network by clicking here:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DOiPVKmMbeM
America First is here to stay and there's not
a thing the Democrats, the Fake News Media, and Big Tech can do
about it.
The Socialists in Congress are fighting for
their socialist agenda.
You and I fighting harder to stop them. And
we are going to win!
These rallies will give the MAGA base the
momentum heading into the 2022 elections and allow America First
Republicans to win across the country so we can take back the
House, FIRE Nancy Pelosi and take back our country.

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: the honest truth
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to hold on to Georgia and Arizona.
#

Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to pitch into my and Mark Kelly’s re-election campaigns — so we can hold these seats in Arizona and Georgia and protect our Democratic Senate majority. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen to the future of our agenda without it.**
My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth — I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for _everyone_ — not just those at the top.
Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: defend voting rights and strengthen our democracy, create good-paying jobs and build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. **But here's the honest truth: We simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by our side — so I have to ask:**
[**Will you give $10 or more right now to help keep me and Mark Kelly in the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-may21?refcode=em210507-1-15&t=1&refcode2=572_6688874_kk2Nm-&akid=572%2E6688874%2Ekk2Nm-)
With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only _one_ seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power — and election experts all over have their eyes on Georgia and Arizona. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to hold the Senate majority.
**Mark and I aren’t taking a dime from corporate PACs. The ONLY way we can keep up is with _your_ grassroots support.**
Our elections were some of the most expensive races in history, and there's no _question_ that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and beat us.
**We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to hold on to these seats in Georgia and Arizona. So please, I'm personally asking:**
[**Will you split a $10 donation between my and Mark’s campaigns to help us fight back so we can continue fighting for change?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-may21?refcode=em210507-1-15&t=2&refcode2=572_6688874_kk2Nm-&akid=572%2E6688874%2Ekk2Nm-)
Thanks for fighting alongside us at moments like these — we appreciate your support.
— Raphael

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=572%2E6688874%2Ekk2Nm-).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

body:
We need to send Ron Johnson packing, and we need your help to keep our campaign powered through the election. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28817023/284438410/-1191835590?refcode=EM_FR_210507runronFR_N_drj_90DA_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTFiZjg3ZS02OGFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XVjK9mpWE_atOvZk_y3_leFlPZV4Zc5MjrG7Q1JA3FI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28817024/284438411/-1191835590?refcode=EM_FR_210507runronFR_N_drj_90DA_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTFiZjg3ZS02OGFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XVjK9mpWE_atOvZk_y3_leFlPZV4Zc5MjrG7Q1JA3FI=) Peter,

"Run, Ron, run.” That’s what Donald Trump said when he gave his full endorsement of Ron Johnson’s re-election campaign.

And you know what? We think Ron should run too.

All 23 of my fellow Democratic Attorneys General are endorsing my campaign for re-election. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28817430/284439711/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNlZTk3OS02YWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYZHxGU8553trPt4Iayu9hgEfcp5vHLG30V8ekrhZJk=&emci=5a3a749b-63af-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=29cee979-6aaf-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=9499186) | Team, **In case you missed it: All 23 of my fellow Democratic Attorneys General are endorsing my campaign for re-election!** Having the support of this brilliant and diverse group of leaders is incredibly humbling, and I’m proud of our collective achievements. My colleagues are doing incredible work across the country and I’m proud to have joined with them on countless lawsuits we’ve brought together on behalf of our individual states. I’ve learned so much from them. With an energetic Biden-Harris Administration and a democratic majority in the general assembly, we have an opportunity to build on our continued progress and accomplish so much more for Virginians. But I need your help to win re-election! **[All 23 Democratic AGs are behind our campaign, how about you? If you’re with us ahead of the June 8 primary, then please donate $23 today so I can continue serving as the People’s Lawyer in Virginia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28817431/284439712/-1633305764?refcode=E8533-20210507-AGSupport-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNlZTk3OS02YWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYZHxGU8553trPt4Iayu9hgEfcp5vHLG30V8ekrhZJk=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28817432/284439713/-1633305764?refcode=E8533-20210507-AGSupport-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNlZTk3OS02YWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYZHxGU8553trPt4Iayu9hgEfcp5vHLG30V8ekrhZJk=) To have the support of all sitting elected Democratic Attorneys General is no small feat and it’s a testament to the working relationships I’ve built. Hello -- Mark Kelly emailed you last week because far-right Republicans are bent on flipping vulnerable Democratic Senate seats in Arizona and New Hampshire.
With Democrats holding a razor-thin 50/50 majority in the Senate, we can't afford to lose an inch, especially as campaigns are heating up.
[**If you 're able, please donate $3 or as much as you can to win in Arizona and New Hampshire, protect Democrats' fragile Senate majority, and continue the fight for progress.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc833/2a380d31/2640580a/f00d0d/1667281668/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0bWVrIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMTA1MDdfYXByaWxtZWsta19ybyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4mek?refcode=e20210507_aprilmek-k_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Your support is so important, friend, and Senators Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan are so grateful to have you standing with them.
Thanks for everything you do.
_\-------------Original Message-------------_
Friends --
I have an important request for you today. I want to ask you to make a donation to support my campaign and Maggie Hassan's. But before I ask, I first want to express my gratitude for all you've done to get us to this moment.
Thanks to your efforts last year, we brought real change to Congress. And I'm amazed by the grassroots energy we're continuing to see from people wanting to improve lives. Because you helped Maggie Hassan win her narrow race in 2016, she was able to help protect health care reform and preserve health care for the most vulnerable Americans. And because you helped elect me to secure a narrow Senate majority, we have delivered relief to millions of American families during the COVID crisis.
But as we've known all along, the election was just a beginning. The real work begins now, and it has never been more urgent for us to deliver change for the people.
But National Republicans have made clear they are bent on taking back our vulnerable Senate seats in Arizona and New Hampshire. That's why your support is so important and why today I have to ask:
[**If you 're able, will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaigns? The amount isn't as important as the donation itself because it's going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our goals and fight for change.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc833/2a380d31/2640580a/f00d0d/1667281668/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMl9td2g0bWVrIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMTA1MDdfYXByaWxtZWsta19ybyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2022_mwh4mek?refcode=e20210507_aprilmek-k_ro&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Burgess Owens
subject: Democrats refuse to take black Republicans seriously
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I need you to take a stand.

****
****
_Oreo.

Token.

Uncle Tim._

And that's not even the worst of the racist slurs black Republicans have been called, but unfortunately, it's not uncommon because **Democrats refuse to take us seriously.**

My father moved from Texas to Ohio because of Jim Crow. With grit and determination, I was one of four black athletes at a historically white school and the third black student to earn a scholarship to the University of Miami.

My beliefs do not negate my experience. **Being a Republican does not make me any less black.**

Yet Democrats _continue_ to belittle me and other black Republicans.

During his campaign, Biden declared that if you didn't vote for him, "you ain't black." Just last week, after Senator Tim Scott delivered his historic speech in response to Biden's Address to Congress, "Uncle Tim" was trending on Twitter. Even worse, he was called an "Oreo" by a Democrat lawmaker.

Yes, a Democrat - _a member of the "cancel culture" party_ - undermined Senator Tim Scott's historic achievement simply because of the color of his skin.

This hurts me to my core because **it undermines every person of color across the nation who doesn 't fall in line with the Left's radical agenda.**

[**We cannot let their racism go unanswered. Will you join me in taking a stand against the Left 's bigotry?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GQZOTWszCz3FR8ZdkehIj_WAoPmzaNlNIem0_sic7n3tZaMlZR8Lp8auZx98K-oKzLQUKaiL718AE2vbg4S_vREG5ExKZTastv8D-SvNxfO5RlhGhkasS2ekvd8m922RB_fFqUKF_bquzryQFW6_OLGah-l5z5dgN4y4L33rt31O7cDSy0JhVnjjUfNkxV9CbZYO0UAlCsAhXi3EEXEpHdNrtyp5lOQiLY4UZKtGFFCr1N3VnEl9l_cJ2LTfSa7WOK80g9G1LuJ-q8CHmB0KFFU-C8n6qha2CRolDqsdkRkYkCC0BnelERRgFhg8HYa91J9JwyLCXqa_7nJkUw3OXx0sHPxg4P7zHYa9kGboKrmfII7qf_hSaRgDyikO-obdU1LpOVuEko6Q0r32Jzuk74IC39E7lu7urYCZmj0gJ6egxaD5JGv7y7MmmBffSFq5OAtpC-tMXF28lFcJrPNwzzIJQJJGbWG&c=nTVcF-ykWIN3WB11uefxF41mTbT6qwX13-sUt79_74XJq9XO6GMcpw==&ch=oCgUmIZVP_IHBgd8aK7-hQTDh884SyYDePBQUySwxoDGOL_sU3IdGg==)
**
The Democrats are more interested in scoring political points, promoting a Socialist agenda, and winning the next election than fighting for what's right.**

[**So, Fellow Conservative, if you can, please chip in $5, $10, or even just $1 to let the Left know we will not take their hypocrisy lying down. Every donation, no matter the size, goes a long way to putting an end to the Left 's reign of terror once and for all.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GQZOTWszCz3FR8ZdkehIj_WAoPmzaNlNIem0_sic7n3tZaMlZR8Lp8auZx98K-oKzLQUKaiL718AE2vbg4S_vREG5ExKZTastv8D-SvNxfO5RlhGhkasS2ekvd8m922RB_fFqUKF_bquzryQFW6_OLGah-l5z5dgN4y4L33rt31O7cDSy0JhVnjjUfNkxV9CbZYO0UAlCsAhXi3EEXEpHdNrtyp5lOQiLY4UZKtGFFCr1N3VnEl9l_cJ2LTfSa7WOK80g9G1LuJ-q8CHmB0KFFU-C8n6qha2CRolDqsdkRkYkCC0BnelERRgFhg8HYa91J9JwyLCXqa_7nJkUw3OXx0sHPxg4P7zHYa9kGboKrmfII7qf_hSaRgDyikO-obdU1LpOVuEko6Q0r32Jzuk74IC39E7lu7urYCZmj0gJ6egxaD5JGv7y7MmmBffSFq5OAtpC-tMXF28lFcJrPNwzzIJQJJGbWG&c=nTVcF-ykWIN3WB11uefxF41mTbT6qwX13-sUt79_74XJq9XO6GMcpw==&ch=oCgUmIZVP_IHBgd8aK7-hQTDh884SyYDePBQUySwxoDGOL_sU3IdGg==)

Without your support, the Democrats will continue to undermine, tokenize, and belittle Republicans of color simply because we do not fit their narrative. These instances are not the first, but with your help, Fellow Conservative, we can make it one of the last.

[**I need you to take a stand.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010GQZOTWszCz3FR8ZdkehIj_WAoPmzaNlNIem0_sic7n3tZaMlZR8Lp8auZx98K-oKzLQUKaiL718AE2vbg4S_vREG5ExKZTastv8D-SvNxfO5RlhGhkasS2ekvd8m922RB_fFqUKF_bquzryQFW6_OLGah-l5z5dgN4y4L33rt31O7cDSy0JhVnjjUfNkxV9CbZYO0UAlCsAhXi3EEXEpHdNrtyp5lOQiLY4UZKtGFFCr1N3VnEl9l_cJ2LTfSa7WOK80g9G1LuJ-q8CHmB0KFFU-C8n6qha2CRolDqsdkRkYkCC0BnelERRgFhg8HYa91J9JwyLCXqa_7nJkUw3OXx0sHPxg4P7zHYa9kGboKrmfII7qf_hSaRgDyikO-obdU1LpOVuEko6Q0r32Jzuk74IC39E7lu7urYCZmj0gJ6egxaD5JGv7y7MmmBffSFq5OAtpC-tMXF28lFcJrPNwzzIJQJJGbWG&c=nTVcF-ykWIN3WB11uefxF41mTbT6qwX13-sUt79_74XJq9XO6GMcpw==&ch=oCgUmIZVP_IHBgd8aK7-hQTDh884SyYDePBQUySwxoDGOL_sU3IdGg==)

While the Left continues to insult black Republicans, I will continue to fight for all.

Thank you,

Congressman Burgess Owens

clean_body: I need you to take a stand. ** Oreo. Token. Uncle Tim. And that's not even the worst of the racist slurs black Republicans have been called, but unfortunately, it's not uncommon because Democrats refuse to take us seriously. My father moved from Texas to Ohio because of Jim Crow. With grit and determination, I was one of four black athletes at a historically white school and the third black student to earn a scholarship to the University of Miami. My beliefs do not negate my experience. Being a Republican does not make me any less black. Yet Democrats continue to belittle me and other black Republicans. During his campaign, Biden declared that if you didn't vote for him, "you ain't black." Just last week, after Senator Tim Scott delivered his historic speech in response to Biden's Address to Congress, "Uncle Tim" was trending on Twitter. Even worse, he was called an "Oreo" by a Democrat lawmaker. Yes, a Democrat - a member of the "cancel culture" party - undermined Senator Tim Scott's historic achievement simply because of the color of his skin. This hurts me to my core because it undermines every person of color across the nation who doesn 't fall in line with the Left's radical agenda. == The Democrats are more interested in scoring political points, promoting a Socialist agenda, and winning the next election than fighting for what's right. == Without your support, the Democrats will continue to undermine, tokenize, and belittle Republicans of color simply because we do not fit their narrative. These instances are not the first, but with your help, Fellow Conservative, we can make it one of the last. == While the Left continues to insult black Republicans, I will continue to fight for all. Thank you, Congressman Burgess Owens == Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. == NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (58606). As Joe Biden enters his fifth month in office, Americans have the opportunity to reflect on the work President Trump did to advance our conservative agenda.

Before COVID-19, President Trump built the world’s most prosperous economy. He brought jobs, factories and industries back to the United States. He rebuilt and invested in rural America. He passed historic tax relief for the middle class. He made historic inroads towards peace in the Middle East.

Not to mention, he garnered the attention and action of millions of grassroots conservatives and Republicans around the country, reinvigorating the party with his bold leadership.

Friend,

It’s Teacher Appreciation Week –– a chance for us to recognize and celebrate the thousands of Hoosier educators who do so much for our students and our communities!

We can’t thank teachers enough for all their hard work and dedication, especially during this past year filled with challenges unlike any we’ve ever faced.

But education is more than just essential.

**It’s the MOST significant investment we can make in our future, and that’s why Governor Holcomb is investing in education at a record high level in Indiana’s new budget.**
[](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1b7902bac95b46349a080ea01b4a92c9&_e=KHcxkF5LaBIlCrQPR1gywwhSGmI28lXgESc789keHgedJq35QSUzkx1PYhDtU40wJ3NSgEHH2BM-c15f7BsmQa3t5H26diB5mcwfiOoInKxvrSbVUcp9hOiWnhUz82Icy7fqU3jnH4TQlxL-5xSd6e3bC6auO6Zt5t1to3om9yfZ4eKEsEpSxcj37yjynzagkWEjpg3fXiDXt_9yPbnyqmbGhkH6kf0FGaUI-p40Cxri0niv7X4deN-cR41SyXPTMqrusmNxfNrOZ1DCxjA8x44CHOnct2aIVDjd0PG1Vn7tzkKYkePkJgYDWWgK4eJp0iwWrtngEVj1JAkQyJE5JPlDBzKYnCh8QqsDkJJ0AA8ikFCHT6M7x6vH0lzG3qRk5cG9BdNqiP3WZ4VboVLZ5Yk7EoaJD6F1xRzvNZL5VsuSpE7iXI7cONszNiHpv6xBDlsWq0tHHRh5VNMlhevUvYg0p7A3T-c7g3VbtPtI8SJO56sof8V_uC5XYoHSxAf1)
When it comes to education in the 2021 legislative session Governor Holcomb:
* Added $1.9 billion in NEW money to K-12 education
* Fully funded K-12 public schools
* Expanded the nation’s best school choice program, covering 48,000 Hoosier students
* Increased K-12 tuition support by $1.03 billion
* Required schools to direct 45% of tuition support to teacher pay
* Recommended all new teacher salaries start at $40,000

In the words of Governor Holcomb, these historic pay raises for teachers and K-12 funding boosts for schools are “game changers.”

The positive impacts from these investments will be felt _**decades**_ down the road in the form of a more skilled workforce, a stronger economy, and a brighter future for all Hoosiers.

**[Friend, before you go, will you join us in celebrating Teacher Appreciation Week by adding your name to thank Hoosier teachers for all they do for our students?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1b7902bac95b46349a080ea01b4a92c9&_e=KHcxkF5LaBIlCrQPR1gywwhSGmI28lXgESc789keHgedJq35QSUzkx1PYhDtU40wJ3NSgEHH2BM-c15f7BsmQa3t5H26diB5mcwfiOoInKxvrSbVUcp9hOiWnhUz82Icy7fqU3jnH4TQlxL-5xSd6e3bC6auO6Zt5t1to3om9yfZ4eKEsEpSxcj37yjynzagkWEjpg3fXiDXt_9yPbnyqmbGhkH6kf0FGaUI-p40Cxri0niv7X4deN-cR41SyXPTMqrusmNxfNrOZ1DCxjA8x-Q-ygTwvJRpgNH43AQKIOJs57uNyJnd27wu1j_kbYXI9PuO3CbovQIp0oo8eVokO3ZMmrAUA85AzY_Ur46MCSHuizI_yUDr1k39fbh7R2wPfnVPY_YxSxOzCPMGVh0nZxV-aiv42k7g8_G6BGuSUPR56fi7f90l_8PPVrV9-FGmZyXSUojreaHHw4LvZ_MS8xfFQ5PSodYhB-9-CW9-pO65yjjdjfh09pqFAm7ieohA)**
[**ADD YOUR NAME: THANK HOOSIER TEACHERS**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=1b7902bac95b46349a080ea01b4a92c9&_e=KHcxkF5LaBIlCrQPR1gywwhSGmI28lXgESc789keHgedJq35QSUzkx1PYhDtU40wJ3NSgEHH2BM-c15f7BsmQa3t5H26diB5mcwfiOoInKxvrSbVUcp9hOiWnhUz82Icy7fqU3jnH4TQlxL-5xSd6e3bC6auO6Zt5t1to3om9yfZ4eKEsEpSxcj37yjynzagkWEjpg3fXiDXt_9yPbnyqmbGhkH6kf0FGaUI-p40Cxri0niv7X4deN-cR41SyXPTMqrusmNxfNrOZ1DCxjA8x7m3_Pvq3xyODYXOKUu3gMMcguAkGNon0ENOv9gf2WCOUGZRbdvuS3xb9ducGu5TNuaRnsmSnxm60w6mriKBdKoER-mknn1fyssDjhVe7dqoLfYUNZDp6DbjmT71IZKpOid3q0_Wm4ettyedUzNb4R6-b4mpEnOZ8VBZxDnJgELR5gT6Kvxqq7qDX-KTwn3uCOcS_Oy8xBkhU5oucSizKghguJ67J3NjSozFUvluWztM)

I wanted to follow up in case you missed my message. President Biden’s first 100 days in office have been a total disaster for Pennsylvania. I’m sad t Peter, I wanted to follow up in case you missed my message. President Biden’s first 100 days in office have been a total disaster for Pennsylvania. I’m sad to report that from higher taxes and lower wages to direct attacks on our Constitution, things are only going to get worse from here. That's why I’m asking you to join me in the fight for commonsense policies that will benefit real Americans and get our economy back on the right track. [**If you agree that we need to stand up for Pennsylvania, push back against Biden’s radical agenda and get American back on the right track, click here to chip in >>>**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=f4241f8309e94efea3d6d1705bdfe5c2&_e=QkfSFhBEfDhatTw97BpIxn3pNlxWftzgAz51nPLuhW-0Z4Ujzz0Z8NstwQ8Jf7gDrFguREOp-dePgoli78O6VgNbRPxw4mpT1hLPcOuZgZBr18iUxt-GEIcxDKivrD1dnnMCuZAib-cXGBnB4ipggEv-vwBdo6kqQ7nfPJE7pqPYhcf-nxH58aXNl40Wuf2J0k8X_N8r7eFjlNoB5SjGjR3YYWnV-InUXEg-0ON-Orx02IyHkBveLnilz1hOc_4A06_3kjBXvvj9bvRJ1mhdstLxoGpHfrI7Yo8iMsOElgggqS_zo4BKpLmSNnD4V3QrlzTC0bzR-3b9obcPhSgDxXR2CwjplJKyfVDGuIzN4Zc1mHp3IFXz9MeqmcG1dUJjiUErGwqluYxvCY-8hYZcYuf0rKpeokMSKo1iy33JQtNwUPFRVBdSC78LWSrMZPdiG9hDViN-q2dt-0KiYMe7uw%3D%3D) I’m counting on you, Peter, to help me stand up for Pennsylvania and for all of our hardworking American families. clean_body: I wanted to follow up in case you missed my message. President Biden’s first 100 days in office have been a total disaster for Pennsylvania. I’m sad t Peter, I wanted to follow up in case you missed my message. President Biden’s first 100 days in office have been a total disaster for Pennsylvania. I’m sad to report that from higher taxes and lower wages to direct attacks on our Constitution, things are only going to get worse from here. That's why I’m asking you to join me in the fight for commonsense policies that will benefit real Americans and get our economy back on the right track. I’m counting on you, Peter, to help me stand up for Pennsylvania and for all of our hardworking American families. \-- Lisa \--------Forwarded Message Below------ Peter, Biden’s first 100 days have now come and gone, and it’s disappointing to see that President Biden has used this time to enact radical executive orders and double-down on policies that hurt our hardworking Pennsylvania families. Biden claimed that he would support unity and bipartisanship, but over the last 100 days, he’s done the opposite. He’s catering to his Far-Left base and liberal special interest donors while the rest of American gets left behind. In just 100 days, Biden managed to do nearly everything he promised he wouldn’t do. Let me give you a brief recap: He proposed an infrastructure package that had almost nothing to do with infrastructure. He proposed a tax plan full of tax hikes that would hurt middle class Americans far more than it would help them. He killed thousands of energy jobs without a viable plan to support displaced workers. He broke his promise to stand up to China and has left America vulnerable to our adversaries time and time again. He continues to ignore the southern border crisis that his radical open-border policies caused. Worst of all, Biden has attacked our U.S. Constitution by threatening our 2nd Amendment and states’ rights. It’s clear that President Biden has let us down over the past 100 days. That’s why I’m standing up to fight for commonsense policies that will improve the lives of Pennsylvania families. Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

Despite overwhelming national approval rates for President Biden’s work so far, Mitch McConnell and his Republican colleagues are doing everything they can to obstruct his agenda based on partisan politics. By electing more women and mothers who get it. **It's not easy for mothers of young children to get in that political door, it’s near impossible.** [**Here are the depressing facts to prove it: At the start of 2020, only 26 congress seats are held by moms with children under 18.****That’s 5% of our legislators.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28820706/284453375/-1644589594?refcode=0507&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZTFjYWNmLTc1YWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wySlqEPPcm3MHH_kS60CHJ4UYehpvUyPHNH_NXVzU8g=) With your help, we can elect passionate, progressive women to office whose campaign strategy encapsulates practical, fair ideas like raising the minimum wage, health care for all women and the right to control their own bodies, and paid family leave. **Until we have more moms and more women in office, we will not prioritize the issues that could have the greatest impact on working families and the economy.** [**Help us change the political landscape by supporting qualified, hard-working individuals who truly know first-hand what the majority of Americans endure from day to day—especially moms, raising the children of our future. Thank you!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28820707/284453376/-1644589594?refcode=0507&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZTFjYWNmLTc1YWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wySlqEPPcm3MHH_kS60CHJ4UYehpvUyPHNH_NXVzU8g=) [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/28820708/284453377/-1644589594?refcode=0507&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZTFjYWNmLTc1YWYtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wySlqEPPcm3MHH_kS60CHJ4UYehpvUyPHNH_NXVzU8g=) **Simona Grace** Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office Moms in Office
