body:
| | |

I was taking some time to reflect this morning with my husband. Did you know that tomorrow marks one month until the Virginia primary?

We have so much to be proud of:

* Our polling shows positive momentum and excitement from those that hear my story
* Strong finance filing that solidified that we can take on Terry McAuliffe and win
* Numerous endorsements from local and national leaders (and EMILY’s List!!!)

My team is working around the clock and spending to zero to make the most of the final month before the primary.

**[That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. Can I count on you to contribute now?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-y8XP2vLA1AHRu1Do4p3ifKqDa08QsudGI3mhEkxDi_-t_JAimx-dV7OyYslKjdbm9260AwVzkPHgNFqUhCXnJ9nQBwr018TRuwgxWFyz_6L-_1pbac6JRIyq46BSNO4pvTNKe74ISfzNumAcMQte8uEKwhiM1DjcfVRw9V6dA1vMK_-JSMPYm84A8B0Fq4dEyqm97ITjPC1X_ekWxsZhJ8OJfeJ9MHdthiWDTwgsM8sgaXYjm4tCLbnX4LMvG6utFwm86tRsnwEiAbpNd76U1w/3bp/YgfD68drRM6IwmJmOPC6Qw/h0/P6nTS6Q9RhavgAgsZenZDNv1zK9PN0DnBU_FXrJd1Q8)**

As you know, I’m a Democrat, a public defender, a foster mom, a former Virginia delegate -- and **if I win my race, I’ll be the first Black woman governor in the history of the United States of America.**

**I know the status quo isn’t working. We can move into the future -- but only if we elect new leaders committed to lifting up every Virginian left behind by politics as usual.**

**[I am that leader and I’m counting on you to ensure my campaign has the resources we need to compete and make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-y8XP2vLA1AHRu1Do4p3ifKqDa08QsudGI3mhEkxDi_-t_JAimx-dV7OyYslKjdbmRS9ho6CzbCLnnLXyjutw4pe1GRCPCtTSFj9-6nTsSnGDUDltBZY6e9TXluftNlarUUO_XEvY8jI2u9WMPVbxAFkLsZCfXrg2SFASGSvMii7T3GxsA4nFvQAK_odf_sLjgIriZVmv62lw5QycpdaHwlWE0h6ENoyZlPBqGYQoboJ2iuGHJ85B9BxS-eCIZf810dgnvIvsECTrv7s0DXlMqw/3bp/YgfD68drRM6IwmJmOPC6Qw/h1/aKx_-iNA4weDU10cUFy8aW9mHGB6Yhw_zeFowvGPKTk)**

Thanks for your support!

Jennifer

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_Bh73lWki93nG0RUyySk6zkTRBWLykLOh_ikrEg1x5MB8GLRsGBE5uifaOB0J-jmAOaYowt4HpE_xD2noR62vCSHYTRAvbmvgcNMkbq3SQ10pTE4mKpPmtCIUl4LFrON2Pz0xWyv7WqrcjuwhH87Ccn9qcw1TL2vJP9Wfe9v5KCFdGpu0HcnXNnxqvL7_6WXsCXa3sK2uTjIbt5_vxVtP1-9gGA5VPuYKu5Ra2tGggyg/3bp/YgfD68drRM6IwmJmOPC6Qw/h2/Q-9bI24_agUhTL76g4O6Pf_wao5z7QTAvuSe7rjvjwc)**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_pXkWAZF1xX_YPR-e_nM-xsMzwmhzFMlK0z2hbrgzKa-f7zYMZsOq7_EE0FD1khEW2LoyBHI88NzjZ2oOL2b0SrRJ936wmk6hKFfKq-Y2mvaN6-9EjyyUwej7T8PpkdL0PylMffewZ4xbu1ydX1dqo_kq_0lGDVkVWPnlBftMkSGpr6OkmPNsBtG3Gdbe_YIUHUl-6QKdG4c-8nj4OzwKjC9n2OH-as0qE39O_H5UHaQ/3bp/YgfD68drRM6IwmJmOPC6Qw/h3/3zjVo__sHfYxA_MYYbmkCNLRoyM2FJdyoxqvBHEmzAo) | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor

Peter,
Today, Facebook flexed their censorship muscle by upholding their ban on President Trump.

Unfortunately, this decision comes as a surprise to no one— **Facebook operates as the censorship arm of the democrat party. **

But it’s not just President Trump who has suffered under the oppressive thumb of these Silicon Valley digital oligarchs!!

The free speech of everyday Americans has been at the mercy of Facebook and Twitter for far too long!

Some say we should revoke Section 230, which allows these tech giants to regulate free speech, but I think we should take it a step farther — **we must break up big tech! **

Yesterday, I joined Fox and Friends to discuss this critical issue.

_**WATCH THIS FOX AND FRIENDS CLIP **_
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=96b699441c744a9a803552deae1f2936&_e=2p_8pB3EfTEMDZfR-g1G58FxYI2D_SD2GTDxtwgYYWmn6QmNBJDOScV5Nc5GXcuMTP28cC8QRcccGbLcJG7oF3c_7uQIbFnSwYcJnL9arsOBVugzoViqlQVhuGp7lgdwa1w8oBFRFSqlTEuJ_kTPNE2kyw5qfNYD9kCAvN9XQXh-1AA1KBusevakBdH1CHmx5Lkv4MBd7op7JflE8MwbXgbqC7r8BvK0vX0JNyiPNCOCkJxWme_MtDmqH5tprG1_mt-hHcIxRoKRa_U_o_3V_TlJTBmgkDphGlJjWlc2By1aU40gkyx54FpTZ0Ee8rCxRvUXt6EVrJ08mcDETO4R11M-e4SRM92PCeUTjJAl_EtzvOPELfrTR4YHaRRTPsHFr_5AIIzFG_DOeO4uGZ46SQ%3D%3D)
I am on the frontlines, but I can’t do it alone. **Will you help fund my crusade against big tech? **

clean_body: It's clear that big tech has WAY too much power and influence over everyday life. Peter, Did you see this email from Josh? On Wednesday, Facebook doubled down on their decision to cancel President Trump’s Facebook account. It’s clear that big tech has WAY too much power and influence over everyday life. Josh is doing more than just talking about the problem, he’s taking action! Josh has already introduced legislation to break up big tech, and cut those Silicon Valley oligarchs down to size! He can’t do it alone, and we know massive corporations won’t be funding his campaign — he needs patriots like you! If you think big tech is too powerful or woke corporations are too hypocritical, and are looking for a conservative to stand up for everyday Americans, then donate today. We’re in this together, Team Hawley \-------Forwarded message------- From: Josh Hawley Date: May 5, 2021 | | Peter, Today, Facebook flexed their censorship muscle by upholding their ban on President Trump. Unfortunately, this decision comes as a surprise to no one— Facebook operates as the censorship arm of the democrat party. But it’s not just President Trump who has suffered under the oppressive thumb of these Silicon Valley digital oligarchs!! The free speech of everyday Americans has been at the mercy of Facebook and Twitter for far too long! Some say we should revoke Section 230, which allows these tech giants to regulate free speech, but I think we should take it a step farther — we must break up big tech! Yesterday, I joined Fox and Friends to discuss this critical issue. WATCH THIS FOX AND FRIENDS CLIP I am on the frontlines, but I can’t do it alone. Will you help fund my crusade against big tech? God Bless, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

subject: Join me in celebrating AAPI Heritage Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28821902/284456778/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODk3NDU0OC03OWFmLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXNtoFN6urNOAaZdzWfH6MRSYigqetKzgK4b_Dgg-rE=)

| | Team, This week marks the beginning of **AAPI Heritage Month** — a time to recognize and celebrate the contributions Asian American and Pacific Islander Americans make to the fabric of our society. Nevada is home to vast Asian American populations with rich and celebrated cultures, and I am proud to serve as a representative from such a diverse cross section of our country. The recognition of AAPI Heritage Month is particularly poignant this year, as the COVID-19 pandemic has given rise to an increase in hate crimes perpetrated against Asian Americans. Following dangerous rhetoric from divisive leaders, it is all the more important that we recognize and honor the endless positive contributions Asian Americans make to our country _every single day._ Many of my Republican colleagues have turned a blind eye to these heinous trends over the past year. So I want my constituents to know that I unequivocally stand with you as we work to _**Stop AAPI Hate.**_ **Just last month, the U.S. Senate passed the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act, a critical piece of legislation aimed at reducing hate crimes in the United States. The bill will come to the House of Representatives next, and I am proud to support this important bill.** Let’s work together to make this month not just one of celebration, but also one of dedication to the effort to end anti-AAPI racism. Together, we can build a society that uplifts, supports and defends everyone, and I am proud to stand with you in that mission today. Thank you for being part of this team, Susie Lee

[](mailto:info@susieleeforcongress.com)
clean_body: | = | | Team, This week marks the beginning of AAPI Heritage Month — a time to recognize and celebrate the contributions Asian American and Pacific Islander Americans make to the fabric of our society. Nevada is home to vast Asian American populations with rich and celebrated cultures, and I am proud to serve as a representative from such a diverse cross section of our country. The recognition of AAPI Heritage Month is particularly poignant this year, as the COVID-19 pandemic has given rise to an increase in hate crimes perpetrated against Asian Americans. Following dangerous rhetoric from divisive leaders, it is all the more important that we recognize and honor the endless positive contributions Asian Americans make to our country every single day. Many of my Republican colleagues have turned a blind eye to these heinous trends over the past year. So I want my constituents to know that I unequivocally stand with you as we work to Stop AAPI Hate. Just last month, the U.S. Senate passed the COVID-19 Hate Crimes Act, a critical piece of legislation aimed at reducing hate crimes in the United States. The bill will come to the House of Representatives next, and I am proud to support this important bill. Let’s work together to make this month not just one of celebration, but also one of dedication to the effort to end anti-AAPI racism. Together, we can build a society that uplifts, supports and defends everyone, and I am proud to stand with you in that mission today. Thank you for being part of this team, Susie Lee | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148 mailto:info@susieleeforcongress.com

name: Tim Burchett
subject: The Left Won't Silence Us 🗣️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=39976ad1429646789a274b3b4eee5f86&_e=lVytq57rBJRU1jc-kl5-i8f79iR9FrYomGlr1jZ2E8t0R1kFG-Z6pFruz8FYCDKLubcqQw9iT59BkOrjNTxcRMvu87VY4WASW-Qg8OADcQv8X5Dvmg1VmAmpcrWKzzHSKqL1ybjVfVdR5Zkm6EygpnDtNUchXEQEEhfJ39_6Z00vKdDStwu9NbwN-CtJb8m_zaWcXN8qh-hmHPpk6E48lf7AHuV68xXY0gKGI5JNWUc9DgylV3wXYTvcER6nNnpDgSWJSKJgrePTE2HQUFTJ_3_TDxngKC9T5Yo3OMV_Ve0%3D) **The Left Won't Silence Us 🗣️****
** After months of deliberation, Facebook’s Oversight Board announced it will [uphold](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=39976ad1429646789a274b3b4eee5f86&_e=lVytq57rBJRU1jc-kl5-i0-xxtrF1_SrSDqfgu-XoXS_aKnili0cWHEcw0ass-VOprQFm0wUkUD36jl8O-u26FEjZWiZJjfG8QkxGk_o2EVLXPtwNbc7qPDoAHw6Pau5b9cyzzygjeS_QouyYUxc6N8YTZEbMrfT6-lt4lTZyj10V5offQ8zsSxozkIE1gvelHxIKiV4meP_P7kfJ3ZSk2nTgzMvt3TM1Ij7MIqD7b1ow82FZzPgvq86PNTCqcWAZBWwzPSYPVHpg-dj6SUtxCv-znqiaO_VB1ddvWzRv369knZX-qy4msqIKKH2U3Fv) Donald Trump’s suspension on both Facebook and Instagram. Don’t be surprised. Big Tech unfairly targets conservative voices and uses a rigged system to justify its actions. I joined Rob Finnerty on Newsmax this week to defend our freedom of speech: [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=39976ad1429646789a274b3b4eee5f86&_e=lVytq57rBJRU1jc-kl5-i-w5u6LCHkuziUhvDCbIpNL73A3b3TblQ3ROi6w2pS68zkOwEGBviLY7YB5GR9jSB8Qsu4Lqbtd11nFrgToWG79xQfDuLZkI6Cyyp7M1UhVO7oXlm9_6aZv-46TtFYim1TeSMPISwdU-7UYfccG_bh4rwYYt5y8PiQyQLVDtZ46uHIZGkUOJoeygwCIwPeB1_voMlBqr2eY_ec4JVFY_jT3iDwYJJYPVC3zfph-nrTguqJ4ay0Cl-EufIIyCHK1s7WMiJZKqdYmGyK870cMXS8M%3D)
First, let’s not pretend the Facebook Oversight Board is an independent body, interested in unbiased truth. The board is [filled](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=39976ad1429646789a274b3b4eee5f86&_e=lVytq57rBJRU1jc-kl5-i7wiB80dqNAT5sOhhd9vplnHsLxfW83KaZ13sElKf6r3K9TgwcGETcO20d8KY_JYsp0BO0Eo3jKoQ59XPvp9mbeRyFP6-F0G5ldOZC1UmUBn0tAIQdlSZjbp865Or6S1axNipN_G4VhtxiA8jHswQQ42E-hJcsTRRSY3RpvA08JTtCKAqU4axKqOXbbwcpuEX79myizPQ4uCjE6nFjGIVyQxZhAfLxVI0XLA8dq7-2qDJVCEUoqYCJ1kArGx5lKKNn63YWUpxaSc6H25S5fIIDHOF1g9NLrxOz0WXMUXGQvmGBuI_4yDIJ0bzBnTdmpw7iMA7GPH6TaUe5ZDC4ipFEg%3D) with leftists who are appointed to do Facebook’s bidding.

Second, Facebook, like the rest of Big Tech, has a bad habit of unfairly targeting conservatives. In this case, the board [ruled](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=39976ad1429646789a274b3b4eee5f86&_e=lVytq57rBJRU1jc-kl5-i7wiB80dqNAT5sOhhd9vplnHsLxfW83KaZ13sElKf6r3K9TgwcGETcO20d8KY_JYsp0BO0Eo3jKoQ59XPvp9mbeRyFP6-F0G5ldOZC1UmUBn0tAIQdlSZjbp865Or6S1a46-cjoCdGzI6xoC_mDLsilUYKS8z17SH6G3Gm-Aw5zcO_0pYmVENaVzw-FailtX-Hv-IZzIANxEjqhgNCip8IAdzmaAMutrYJy5L1ly0v38GZHlIYtvLccUZzQ8AprkPgU_wMfkIJfGBpXJ7f-UZvDrfgoh-RXowIv4qI08gWrz_zx8iXDV_COTwmsTGskJZeBI6BIt0B_aTTYAQ8HBLaA%3D) that Trump violated Facebook’s rules guiding “voice,” “dignity,” and “safety.” But when several Democrat leaders [condoned](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=39976ad1429646789a274b3b4eee5f86&_e=lVytq57rBJRU1jc-kl5-ixf-L3MuT1OWBeOtdvxmsCkbBe1dJRIKUnEEKc2f1bYyIu02FQUGk6ALet-w4h-WftTg-LVOLEw2EkI8w3-ZzqruWAOMQmNRkW7butp0v5PNQvRFh9wrKSybElyK1lr0SkOgVRmLqpbZty0QiaH3-mmhyJ6qY9j9kUbBJ_7PW3L_OmW4Uy2ocGS1UcQQsbk6shd50jDiMbSwOwOZKnkVPUtselJ0HKC3BKP_cu82itt0qYaijvUSBwIh2kBZy2V3X2vTom316qTREXYuMVhTznpsM4TVHDng9JFlhv3dRHax47GWlsliaLkAbBtUNvIfNBxxb34tXaP7QRvJHrnUhnrrW0kHp9Q9i073ECrdfdfk) rioting and looting over the summer, Big Tech was silent.

Big Tech’s double standard toward conservatives is unfair and dangerous. If social media companies have their way, the next conservative voice to be canceled could be mine or yours. **It’s up to us to make sure that doesn’t happen.**
|
---
**VFW Post 5154 75th Anniversary 🎖️
**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=39976ad1429646789a274b3b4eee5f86&_e=lVytq57rBJRU1jc-kl5-i0kECZ_qtoZuTH3FnabuBt2EzcSFp267ZP4xPk0Q7eyLd99d3MjO7XVS7hnsqbGnS4OJDujUsTvkQF4PAm_Hm15r8GraDrrZEtGRubfDcFozfI2EDfHkXtdOvfsF2YaJ5oK0S9sST14cKZl1cHgN9wdlAKmrXhT6hE2We93fypPhbP0kOSDNf9eT6UXq4N3Aq6WagkDwWMNraFQdPCBnbowEtGlAwGUSShVpKnvvcQVcFskwU26evt_Mr6JPGrYJ0LCYj9863DLytQZlo2o8yuyOHBObB0d0WfSYFktw69ogg8kEcFsajIuobcx8ZatnnzNJGxrz-J75a2W34VoIBXBVdy1ePdlesAVDtvpcBZPD3h17aqJhwLmv3LLqKbkE_ZRYZ-r0itEFgJyzjsESZdUAKaXvKkhUdzdrXTtgomZL)
_ _
I had the honor of speaking at the Veterans of Foreign Wars Post 5154 75th anniversary this past week. Blount County Memorial Post 5154 was chartered on Jan. 30, 1946. Tennessee veterans came together to help fellow veterans and enjoy each other’s friendship and shared experiences.

Members have spent countless hours helping local veterans during food drives and other events. They run the annual Patriots Pen essay contest for middle schoolers and Voice of Democracy speech contest for high schoolers, which help instill patriotism in the next generation.
|
---
**Just For Fun 🚗**

This taxi driver saved a cat’s life – in style. Police [captured](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=39976ad1429646789a274b3b4eee5f86&_e=lVytq57rBJRU1jc-kl5-i2pNToopkm3DOnik1bVzf8d8ekEOTJuEfKF9hNxjRA8-YldxW4jDA8b5i5nhB5N51dJeo91D6KuTKeSsjG8DQW8QXg3BahVIedZD8J0a4dAAzEUzhx1uX3cc5YUIuaOsn4-arQfUxEx3227ajUF2SX03pgo6FDg4qfUdhHwRUCkkz1vFWVt-XOvbCGQz7VAk9GTe-yfnJW699qCQxXRn4mj-hO7LI8sOMSpYmvslQ-5UMfnSdxTD2154k0TgrLevIYn7TPV5BFiud7q4EPXkVMQ%3D) photos of a Toyota hatchback that became partially perched on the hood of a Jeep when the driver swerved to avoid a cat in a very narrow street. Thankfully no one was hurt – not even the cat!

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. The Left Won't Silence Us 🗣️ After months of deliberation, Facebook’s Oversight Board announced it will Donald Trump’s suspension on both Facebook and Instagram. Don’t be surprised. Big Tech unfairly targets conservative voices and uses a rigged system to justify its actions. I joined Rob Finnerty on Newsmax this week to defend our freedom of speech: First, let’s not pretend the Facebook Oversight Board is an independent body, interested in unbiased truth. The board is with leftists who are appointed to do Facebook’s bidding. Second, Facebook, like the rest of Big Tech, has a bad habit of unfairly targeting conservatives. In this case, the board that Trump violated Facebook’s rules guiding “voice,” “dignity,” and “safety.” But when several Democrat leaders rioting and looting over the summer, Big Tech was silent. Big Tech’s double standard toward conservatives is unfair and dangerous. If social media companies have their way, the next conservative voice to be canceled could be mine or yours. It’s up to us to make sure that doesn’t happen. | VFW Post 5154 75th Anniversary 🎖️ I had the honor of speaking at the Veterans of Foreign Wars Post 5154 75th anniversary this past week. Blount County Memorial Post 5154 was chartered on Jan. 30, 1946. Tennessee veterans came together to help fellow veterans and enjoy each other’s friendship and shared experiences. Members have spent countless hours helping local veterans during food drives and other events. They run the annual Patriots Pen essay contest for middle schoolers and Voice of Democracy speech contest for high schoolers, which help instill patriotism in the next generation. | Just For Fun 🚗 This taxi driver saved a cat’s life – in style. Police photos of a Toyota hatchback that became partially perched on the hood of a Jeep when the driver swerved to avoid a cat in a very narrow street. Thankfully no one was hurt – not even the cat! | Check Out The Burchett Store 👕 Need some Team Burchett swag? We’re here to help. We have hats, t-shirts, and stickers so you can support our campaign and our shared conservative values in style. | Thank you for supporting my work in Congress. Please consider a donation today so we can continue fighting for our values. Stay in Touch 👇 | | ---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Team Sarah
subject: Wisconsin families are paying the price for Ron Johnson's lack of leadership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter,

To be blunt: Ron Johnson has failed Wisconsin. The number of times he's put hard-working families on the backburner is too many to count, but here are some of his worst actions:
* Voting against the American Rescue Plan because "we've given people enough help"
* Abusing his office to look out for his own business interests
* Peddling conspiracy theories and lies about a stolen election
* Blocking stimulus checks from hard-working families
* Voting against raising the minimum wage -- but supporting trillion dollar tax giveaways
* Claiming that the January 6th Capitol rioters "respected law enforcement"
* Elevating fringe science conspiracy theories and downplaying the danger of COVID-19
* Denying the threat of climate change

**Ron Johnson is a disgrace to the office he holds and Wisconsin families are the ones paying the price for his backwards priorities. It's time for him to go.**

Sarah Godlewski is running to defeat Ron Johnson and fight for Wisconsin families, but it's going to be a difficult race. National Republicans know that the fate of the Senate majority runs straight through Wisconsin, so we need to build the strongest grassroots team the Wisconsin GOP has ever seen.

[**If you're ready to get to work to unseat Ron Johnson, will you let us know you're with us? name: Team Erica Smith
subject: 5 reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Georgia wasn’t a fluke. A progressive South is our future.
#
It’s been a long week, so we’ll keep this quick.
Here are five (5) reasons you should [**_contribute to our grassroots movement right now_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/911?refcode=em20210507-71&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=71%2E3698%2E90Oyrk) to elect Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate and expand Democratic control in Congress:
> **1.** North Carolina is one of *the most* competitive states that could flip from red to blue this coming election. If Democrats want to keep gaining power in Congress, then it’s critical that we flip North Carolina’s Senate seat.
> **2.** Expanding Democratic control in the Senate means we’ll be able to pass legislation that will lift families out of poverty and help our economy heal.
> **3.** The more Democratic Senators we have on our bench, the less successful Mitch McConnell will be at blocking the critical legislation that is popular with Democrats AND Republicans.
> **4.** North Carolina flipping blue sends a powerful message – Georgia wasn’t a fluke and a progressive South is our future.
> **5.** Erica Smith is the leader we need in this critical moment. She will lead with integrity, compassion, and competency.
[**_With all of this in mind, will you please make your first grassroots donation to our campaign? Unlike the establishment candidates in this race, Erica is counting on donations from grassroots donors like you to fund our campaign 100%. Click here to donate directly._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/911?refcode=em20210507-71&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=71%2E3698%2E90Oyrk)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/911?refcode=em20210507-71&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=71%2E3698%2E90Oyrk)**
[**__**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/911?refcode=em20210507-71&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=71%2E3698%2E90Oyrk)
Thanks for hearing us out,
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210507-71-footer&t=23&refcode2=71_3698_90Oyrk&akid=71%2E3698%2E90Oyrk)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=71%2E3698%2E90Oyrk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=71%2E3698%2E90Oyrk)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

Peter ー we just saw an internal report from Biden’s Department of Homeland Security, and the numbers are disturbing.

**The Biden Admin has decided not to deport _8,325_ serious criminal offenders, including:**
** → 19 Convicted of Homicide**
** → 27 Convicted of Sexual Offenses**
** → 4 Convicted of Kidnapping**
** → 375 Convicted of Assault**

It is clear that deportations have slowed under the Biden Administration, but now he’s even allowing convicted criminals and criminal gang members like MS-13 to stay in the United States.

That’s why we’re reaching out to you, Peter. We must put an end to Biden’s Border Crisis. _**[Will you sign our petition demanding tha](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=d4e1d9589f5f4adfaff5abe6dfa32527&_e=lCJcb9BBTuizTSMpDy9KDKqbmzhvV0fUJ8iQUqEt_RWfgxHo7gp93brVvuk5tzpn3sw316g4OSE-TjGZUfr-vWyxr7G1nEdzGnr4ZxNfMEgkMh-5uUWawjLCumWALtUImpik1etbwnORNl5lZiHvzw_AYaBLb8JG_ecJWr8C6dHcPZbHP4BmFZ4oOQ4uH1x_5YtbhNciT98D1BlbbNQMq31diWylW4sswHbBHhXV3-LYotO4R-61iP8XWZOoYpBI7gNCjEM1etQThmLlhhJXJEA-5_9sUfBCDV89Bq5RDqKgnOUWKQB6PRsInDE9b-1fmX9ghjbt0Z4b9WVr9CFrbuJmsCV8pc3iJQLqjIdUbrsY0_K5UO9a2BI8PrmDW46MovUcciOh6mJZkG9ySyQaWCnI5NkwRJDS0hFnvchPgevbDbwwYHTfM8DL6gidaxASGRyjkf6TxfJ42KVQDeY3OEC0zYtdmPxqnm3ediy060sCNBAG2uexmSwR8F-urmKL)**_ _**[t the Biden Admin End this Border Crisis?](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=d4e1d9589f5f4adfaff5abe6dfa32527&_e=lCJcb9BBTuizTSMpDy9KDKqbmzhvV0fUJ8iQUqEt_RWfgxHo7gp93brVvuk5tzpn3sw316g4OSE-TjGZUfr-vWyxr7G1nEdzGnr4ZxNfMEgkMh-5uUWawjLCumWALtUImpik1etbwnORNl5lZiHvzw_AYaBLb8JG_ecJWr8C6dHcPZbHP4BmFZ4oOQ4uH1x_5YtbhNciT98D1BlbbNQMq31diWylW4sswHbBHhXV3-LYotO4R-61iP8XWZOoYpBI7gNCjEM1etQThmLlhhJXJEA-5_9sUfBCDV89Bq5RDqLvH1A_zAWr5yDGNyrk_b4OrNgc5CWz2x-_kqXLjam5SRhNc099TH0d4IgcXbwprX79DSolgIq7zlScAMvfwLrQRocGgXL0PZobf89RJJUuMz3bpSyZIwkrm_H8isR6CqVdAQ3Kuq_rY1nRu-4fVwD0vXFsw0Y8wPQ8nPBX0ZwRseDlecE-rQddqiWMCSopbQoQ90PnFAmnZih6SKcwMLad)**_

We knew this would happen

Friend, This month's job report just came out. It was ABYSMAL! **_This President is going to drive us right into another recession._** **Now the Socialist Democrats want to raise our taxes as well!** **This is what happens when Socialists run our country.** We need to get back to President Trump's economic policies that created record unemployment and made our country prosperous. name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, With less than a year until the Republican Primary, Jane continues to build momentum as she travels the state talking about issues important to Ohio voters, our field team continues to bring that message to voters at their door, and Joe Biden continues his string of devastating policies intended to roll back any and all progress we made under the America First agenda. And while Jane continues to crisscross the state, she also appeared in the Delaware Gazette with a Back the Blue op-ed and an opinion piece in the Toledo Blade on the Biden Border Crisis. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Jane Timken: Unwavering Fighter for Donald Trump** Over the last five years, there has only been one candidate in this race who has consistently and reliably been an unwavering fighter for President Trump and his America First agenda: Jane Timken. I know it because I witnessed it firsthand. Day in and day out, Jane worked tirelessly to promote President Trump, his policies, and candidates that would pursue the America First agenda. But don’t take my word for it, look at the actions of each candidate in the race and it is clear as day. Jane took on Kasich’s handpicked Ohio Republican Party Chairman and defeated him with the endorsement of President Trump. Jane personally donated and raised over $5 million in support of the President over two election cycles. I could go on and on, but luckily for you, I won’t. I’ll let a picture do the rest of my talking. **From the Trail** Jane continued her active campaign schedule this week with events across Ohio. On Monday, she stopped by our Columbus Field Office for a door knock launch with our fantastic team of interns and volunteers. The enthusiasm of our field team and the responses to Jane’s message at the door have been fantastic and we couldn’t do it without these hard-working men and women. The Mahoning Valley Republican Women’s Club hosted Jane at their monthly meeting in Canfield on Wednesday. Jane received an enthusiastic response from this passionate group of women. Republicans are fired up across the state! On Thursday, Jane joined the [Ross County Lincoln Day Dinner](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=030fb071c4884541bc3a321193ee04a3&_e=3GelftJ1i5t_UhJxBHOnAZRi0WEB7ZvbsIpdkTTgI__E9oyH2AA-EwL9R2PxuLso68E7OlOWJTnA0pcgF23m6G6b0Mw6QCflnWLccdgwENCbvaPpw9xjh2Kqjo7ZAbK_T-Qn-jvhIw2YRxCJTSCHvkYXV7WyLrxXAuHWTHfU_SBzMkSNjw-ZL0RkArexjOowau3wJ4nPVa7lYZVYaQxmtnToZ6LsRBK55O8kTic2KdFXaqa6fJATyEr8TtYbD-aTWHO---fzYt_1lCP5a08E1SxNxZRMJg4LL1zEsdW7PNFJO8WOipCJq8qn9Vls-C-x9TmjmzHtavAzJYi-tCR_ZxDNCGSsvGavIUKvv-UTNLm6T8-l3sbflXQbOGCAFgYkDtiNgc_zM0Ogv-R91UK4kw%3D%3D) with our friend and State Central Committeewoman from the area Bonnie Ward. **Latest Endorsements and News** Jane continues to garner support from across the state and from all levels of government and politics. We are humbled and honored by the outpouring of support from key elected and party leaders across the state. Full List of This Week’s Endorsements Rep. Tracy Richardson – 86th District Gerard Neugebauer – Mayor of Green Jamie Walters – Stark County Recorder **Joe Biden and the No Good, Very Bad Jobs Report** The April Jobs Report was released this morning, showing that the unemployment rate ROSE to 6.1% in April. Economists have described this report as the worst miss in 23 years! This isn’t the first time that Joe Biden and his Socialist friends in Washington are suffocating our economy with their big-spending, tax-hiking, job-killing policies and it certainly won’t be the last. In fact, the Biden Administration’s response is to double down and attempt to spend even more of your hard-earned dollars to continue their policies that created the problem in the first place. Instead of paying people NOT to work, we need to reopen our economy and get America back to work. As always, if you or anyone you know wants to get involved with Jane’s campaign, visit our website at [www.janetimkenforohio.com](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=030fb071c4884541bc3a321193ee04a3&_e=mtMf2tV3B9UK-CS8X3tGiW7B2EnvhetsvwHfbHbpNugo13VqWXs-HP8v0BYNiM2ifTQhVk38N1xVZj1eOPVGfso0PucXkh6y2_UMRzut_yjMVsVPzKq-Xm7YnxH1_Xx46_QH22yGZdWM9WQvapwxbu2_IDj7LCrw0boVRlImf5e35lfcLD8ZoUCFGnp7YkE2c1_R0Pg2ZqY8o9z4MlA19l31byk5kCRkXwlNQAIFFieSTKZmXzEfMslZ1gecjum_KjX9zqZkSUVi-Orp9Bxauw%3D%3D) and sign up to join the team today! Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=030fb071c4884541bc3a321193ee04a3&_t=RAzoI1_6BBoPrEET5wBmVPHlho3lWSrBLHvf473cM6NMYMTcMyhHvohxMsasajEwJW8lDSnd8wvhi1p_5w2lx9TpLqZwrKUQCAjVXt4ndvIjf0H6kxAvxULFrTshWxQGYepmgcV6sOCK3p2ORc4KrwGVXAeCbii4r5i6C7wAGi8%3D) | | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=030fb071c4884541bc3a321193ee04a3&_e=3GelftJ1i5t_UhJxBHOnAe8OXpBelR9-ds954Xl8Z2M5SRN66YPPg4EEjgo7qB9RM0plBvb1v6hyJF7dGAa5uIFiCWMS1ya3s69-SWdzJ2t1Hk3b7eWNN6lznZktM6fvgto1SLCPAfc83qcAUrsaU4FixmDao5LGVQ8oSgC1zSnliRnIoriAl2ON-dRSW7Ujoc1tFMEm3sCdb6xtAKc7GbFS9mucve5IyJYJm82MPeEt1fUab1jcd5sh-aYinbbCOlwbA_HlocwY-zjy-tuXniJoa56brc3q2d1q00o6tak%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=030fb071c4884541bc3a321193ee04a3&_e=FX7kj0JKTuL4an5JUtxDhor4w0XSfrc5_1zQWmeqfBUibjktuxAV6ZQTiibaNF-vK6tDcJfmn0FArzWc7RLoYZ0natMreiqUV8atJJkaGQ3vGHLvkgx1lEtrbDVubKFm_SrdCuarGdz_g3iRC-uhSOHPt0jR-hMYl5NJqiCQxg6_ylqbArR7tywCp-1iH0RRgqacguk9PtK-sOpbyUftWU6VysSAz2lbooljNKgYeMdU3qI9zB-9OMwSSMgn3Xgljj3WEAIT9OTL6qBsFxfPBQ%3D%3D)

**Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight _****_NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women **
---
|
---
| **Dear ****Derek,**

**Thank you to all who joined us for our reception this past Thursday with Corey Lewandoski. It was terrific to see so many members of our Republican party joined together in support of conservative leadership. We deeply appreciate everyone who was able to purchase tickets in support of our event****

I would also like to congratulate Alderman-elect Sebastian Sharonov on his victory this past week in the Manchester Ward 6 Special Election. I know Sebastian’s grassroots campaign, along with the efforts of Manchester GOP Chair by Rep. Will Infantine, delivered a victory for Manchester taxpayers tonight. Mayor Joyce Craig not only endorsed, but heavily campaigned for the opposing (D) candidate, and the results speak for themselves. Manchester taxpayers are tired of what they’re getting from Mayor Craig and the Manchester Democrats and they are ready to vote for change this November.

****Be sure to stay alert for upcoming events! Entering the summer months, we expect a variety of opportunities for involvement to arise, and hope you’ll join us in reconnecting with fellow Republicans from across the state.**

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **Moving Forward, Working Together For NH**** _by State Rep Sherman Packard_**
A little over a year ago, New Hampshire began facing a public health crisis that changed the way we lived and the way we worked. That proved challenging to everyone, and the Legislature was no exception. From the onset of the Governor’s Stay at Home and Safer at Home guidelines, to today where those guidelines are being peeled away in a measured attempt to reopen New Hampshire safely, there is much to reflect upon.
While each legislative year comes with its own unique set of challenges, the beginning of the current term cast a shadow over a promising victory for Republicans as we earned back the majority in the House. Moving past the sudden passing of my good friend and colleague former Speaker Dick Hinch was a tremendous task – one that unexpectedly propelled me forward into the Speakership. Understanding former Speaker Hinch’s desire to work together – across the aisle – to complete the work our constituents sent us to Concord to do, my leadership team and staff got to work.

Having to follow COVID-19 guidelines, and with the Statehouse Complex being closed to the public, we developed a hybrid model for House policy committee meetings that allowed us to provide a safe, risk-mitigated environment for members and a way to conduct legislative business with little-to-no interruptions. Each committee meeting was set up via Zoom webinar for in-person and at-home attendees to fully participate and allow for public access despite the complex’s closure to the public. We developed extensive health and safety protocols, deployed PPE, and updated our internal procedures. We deployed portable HEPA air filtration systems with anti-contagion UV-C light treatment in each meeting room, and throughout the Statehouse to provide an additional layer of risk mitigation to our working environments....

---

---
| **Democrats’ National Agenda Contrary To New Hampshire Principles**** _ by State Rep Jason Osborne_**

Last week much of America listened to President Joe Biden’s first national address with much chagrin. What America heard was a president who doesn’t trust states’ rights, a president who wants to dictate how average citizens in New Hampshire live their lives, and punish the states like New Hampshire who are doing things right. He wants to make states like New Hampshire, who have only 3% unemployment and a low overall tax burden, look more like California or Massachusetts.

President Biden’s radical agenda at the national level is proposing huge tax increases, infringing on your Second Amendment rights, and dismantling states’ voting laws, but New Hampshire Republicans led by Speaker Packard, Senate President Morse, and Governor Sununu are leading the way ensuring the exact opposite happens on the state level.
Nationally, the left wing threatens to increase taxes on businesses while the New Hampshire House passed a budget that lowers both the Business Profits Tax and the Business Enterprise tax. When taxes are increased on businesses, those costs are passed along to the end user of their products and service: you and I, the consumer. However, when business taxes are reduced, the savings benefit the consumer by lowering prices....

| | This week’s Republican Spotlight is Sebastian Sharonov - Manchester Ward 6’s newest Aldermen-elect! Sebastian is a real representation of the American dream, having grown up outside of Ukraines Capital. He immigrated to the United States in 2012, becoming a naturalized U.S citizen just three years later. During the next 4 years, Sebastion served in the United States Army before voluntarily separating on honorable conditions to further his education. Now Sebastian is a member of U.S Army Reserves, while continuing to pursue legal education.

Endorsed by Governor Chris Sununu, Sebastian Sharonov ran in order to protect the city’s tax cap as well as ensure a high quality of life to Manchester residents. His opposing candidate was less firm on his stance towards these issues and had a heavy endorsement from current Mayor Joyce Craige. The NHGOP and fellow Republicans from across the state would like to congratulate Sebastion on his victory, and celebrate the strong consrvative leadership that will be provided to Granite Staters through his election! Thank you for your deep commitment to the local community.

Judicial Watch SUES over Biden Border Crisis!

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH ELECTION POSTS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22840&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9NaUhIS2lMQTcxZz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUwNzIyNTA0Mw==]
Last week we released
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22760&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2Etc3RhdGUtb2ZmaWNpYWxzLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUwNzIyNTA0Mw==]
records
from the Secretary of State of California revealing how state
officials pressured social media companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google
(YouTube)) to censor election posts. Included were “misinformation
briefing” emails compiled by communications firm SKDK, which lists
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22730&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2tka25pY2suY29tL3RoYW5rLXlvdS10by1hbGwtb2Ytb3VyLXBvbGl0aWNhbC1jbGllbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUwNzIyNTA0Mw==]
Biden
for President as its top client
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22731&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhLXNvcy1iaWctdGVjaC1za2RrLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUwNzIyNTA0Mw==]
of
2020.

The state agency successfully pressured YouTube to censor a Judicial
Watch video concerning vote by mail and a Judicial Watch lawsuit
settlement about California voter roll clean up.

It turns out that California wasn’t the only state acting in seeming
violation of the First Amendment. The new information from Iowa
revealed below exposes the dirty details of the expanding conspiracy
against free expression.

We received 624 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22812&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2lvd2EtYmlnLXRlY2gtYXByaWwtMjAyMS1lcWNlMDg1OTczMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MDcyMjUwNDM=]
of
records from the Secretary of State of Iowa showing how state
officials pressured social media companies Twitter and Facebook to
censor posts about the 2020 election.

Included in these records were emails from Iowa state officials to
representatives of Big Tech pressuring these companies to remove some
of Judicial Watch’s posts. The emails show how the state agency
successfully pressured Facebook to censor our post about Iowa’s
management of its voter rolls.

We received the records as a result of a June 2020 Iowa Open
Records lawsuit filed after the Iowa Secretary of State failed to
comply with our February 2020 request for records and communications
about a Judicial Watch report

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22814&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2lvd2EtYmlnLXRlY2gtZm9pYS1hcHJpbC0yMDIxLXBncy00MDYtNDA4Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUwNzIyNTA0Mw==]

We’ve told them is fake. They have it PINNED to the top of their

Holland responded at 6:11p.m., writing:

Hi Kevin,

Circling back with an update regarding the content posted by Judicial
Watch. Our third-party fact checkers have rated this content false,
and we have applied a filter over the content warning users before
they click to see it that the content has been rated false by
independent fact checkers.

Please continue to report violating content to us by
emailing reports@content.facebook.com, and copying me
(RachelHolland@fb.com), as I will be on an airplane for the next
couple hours. Let me know if you have any questions or concerns
regarding this or any other matters.
A couple of hours later, Hall followed up, “Thank you! They have new
posts up, doubling down on the false claims.”

And Holland responded, “Thanks for flagging- we’ve got a full team
with eyes on this now and are applying the false filter to similar
articles as well. I’ll send you an additional update shortly!”

That same day, Hall and Maria Benson, the director of communications
at the National Association of Secretaries of State, both tried to
convince
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22817&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2lvd2EtYmlnLXRlY2gtZm9pYS1hcHJpbC0yMDIxLXBncy0zNjYtMzgyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUwNzIyNTA0Mw==]
Twitter
to censor Judicial Watch’s posts but were ultimately unsuccessful.

Hall filed a report with Twitter, and Benson escalated it by looping
in Kevin Kane from Twitter. On February 3, 2020, Benson wrote, “Iowa
Secretary of State has reported the below election misinformation, but
Twitter has declined to take it down. As you can see from the facts
the tweets are clearly wrong. I wanted to bring this to your attention
to hopefully remedy the situation. I’ve cc’d Kevin Hall, their
Communicators Director.”
Kane responded rejecting the request saying, “Thanks Maria – This
was reviewed by our team and is not in violation of our election
integrity policy as it does not suppress voter turnout or mislead
people about when. where. or how to vote. I understand this is not the
outcome you are seeking and appreciate you continuing to report Tweets
to our team.”

In an email the next day, Hall wrote to Kane saying, “Facebook,
thankfully, was helpful. I would suggest perhaps reviewing your
policies at Twitter and putting them more in line with what Facebook
is doing to counter election misinformation.”

After being rejected by Twitter, Benson emailed Brian Scully, an
official at the Department of Homeland Security’s Cybersecurity and
Infrastructure Security Agency, writing on February 3, 2020:

Hey Brian,

Can you report this as well? Hannity is now retweeting and Twitter
isn’t playing ball with us. I’ve cc’d Kevin Hall who you met
Saturday. He’s IA SOS’s Communications Director. He’s been
reporting and playing wack a mole by trying to reply to misleading
tweets.
Scully responded promising to contact Twitter. “Sorry ... been out
of pocket a bit. Will reach out to Twitter. Let me know if you get
something.”

These records are yet another example of state officials conspiring
with Big Tech to deny Americans their First Amendment rights. These
records further show that Big Tech censorship is a government scandal:
Iowa government officials worked with Facebook to remove posts they
did not like, and Facebook bowed to this political pressure
immediately. It should be disturbing to all Americans that government
officials are working to censor speech they disagree with and that
these behemoth companies often seem willing to roll over and censor
free speech.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES OVER ABUSE OF CHILDREN TIED TO BIDEN BORDER CRISIS

Little children are in trouble on the border. Texas welfare officials
received three reports of abuse and neglect at the Freeman Coliseum in
San Antonio, where more than 1,300 migrant children reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22836&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvcmVwdWJsaWNhbnMtYW5zd2Vycy1hYnVzZS1hbGxlZ2F0aW9ucy10ZXhhcy1jaGlsZC1taWdyYW50LWZhY2lsaXR5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTA3MjI1MDQz]
had
been held. The site is one of several
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22837&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvaGhzLW5ldy1zaXRlLWZvci1taWdyYW50LWNoaWxkcmVuLW5lYXItZG9ubmEtZmFjaWxpdHk/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MDcyMjUwNDM=]
set
up to handle the recent surge. This came on the heels of claims
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22838&F=T&]
that
multiple facilities where children are being held are unsafe.

To dig into this, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit
against the Department of Health and Human Services for records about
assaults on and abuse of unaccompanied alien children (UAC) in HHS
custody (_Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Health and Human
Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22835&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXVhY3MtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxMTkwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUwNzIyNTA0Mw==]
(No.
1:21-cv-01190)).

We sued after the HHS denied our February 26, 2021, FOIA request
for:

* All summaries from individual case files of reports of physical
and/or sexual abuse or assault of Unaccompanied Alien Children under
the care of HHS, its sub-agencies, and or volunteer agencies,
contractors, grantees, and sub-grantees, to include all segregable,
non-exempt information.
* Records reflecting aggregated data of physical and/or sexual abuse
and assault of UACs under the care of HHS, its sub-agencies, and or
volunteer agencies, contractors, grantees, and sub-grantees.

We are concerned that the surge of migrants seeking to take advantage
of the Biden administration’s lax immigration policies has resulted
in the foreseeable abuse of children, as overwhelmed federal
authorities are ill-equipped to handle the huge number of children
crossing the border. The unprecedented secrecy and censorship
surrounding these sites compounds the problem and limits
accountability. Our lawsuit aims to expose the full truth about this
particularly troubling consequence of the Biden administration’s
lawlessness on immigration.

This is not a new problem. We uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22839&F=T&]
HHS records in July 2018 revealing that in multiple cases,
unaccompanied alien children (UACs) processed during the Obama
administration were assaulted by government employees.

We began _investigating_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=8633&F=T&]
this
matter in 2014 when a wave of UACs swamped the southwest border. Since
that time, we have been investigating incidents of violence, drug
trafficking, human trafficking, and other criminal activities, as well
as whether migrant children were being abused while in U.S. shelters.

FACEBOOK’S BRAZEN BAN OF PRESIDENT TRUMP SHOULD CONCERN EVERY
AMERICAN

The Facebook Oversight Board’s decision upholding President
Trump’s Facebook ban undermines the First Amendment and free speech.
The brazen ban of President Trump is already chilling the speech of
other Facebook users and Internet users generally, who fairly worry
about Facebook and Big Tech censoring and deplatforming them.

I have been personally locked out of Twitter for four months over a
tweet previously found not to be in violation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=21853&F=T&]
of
Twitter’s rules.

Judicial Watch previously argued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22204&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctZmFjZWJvb2stY2Vuc29yc2hpcC10cnVtcC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MDcyMjUwNDM=]
that Facebook’s Oversight Board should have reversed the
president’s ban because the ban is an affront to First Amendment
protections of free speech, peaceable assembly, and the right to
petition the government. There is no credible evidence that President
Trump either morally or legally incited violence. He was resoundingly
acquitted by the United States Senate after the impeachment
“prosecutors” failed to produce credible evidence he incited
violence. For Facebook and its Oversight Board to suggest President
Trump incited violence and that complaints about the administration of
an election could incite violence is a political position aligned with
the Left and political opponents of President Trump and his
supporters.

JUDICIAL WATCH REVEALS CENSORED HISTORY OF 2020 ELECTION

We continue to investigate the serious questions concerning the 2020
election. Our chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison, summarizes
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22841&F=T&]
our efforts in his _Investigative Bulletin_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22842&F=T&

Judicial Watch has uncovered critical new details in the secret
history of the 2020 election: how state government officials—at
times interfacing with the Biden presidential campaign—colluded with
Twitter, Facebook, and YouTube to censor freedom of speech.

The new information raises enormous constitutional and legal
questions. It challenges the conventional wisdom that the companies
are operating solely as private actors and can remove or ban users of
their services as they see fit, with no violation of First Amendment
rights.

The new documents “suggest a conspiracy against the First Amendment
rights of Americans,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton.
“These documents blow up the big lie that Big Tech censorship is
‘private’—as the documents show collusion between a whole group
of government officials in multiple states to suppress speech about
election controversies.”

In California, we obtained more than 500 pages of documents
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22843&F=T&]
showing
how a state agency, the Office of Election Cybersecurity, tracked
social media commentary and pushed Big Tech to take down posts.
Included in the documents were so-called “Misinformation Daily
Briefings” from the communications firm SKDK. The firm also was
deeply involved in the Biden presidential campaign
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22844&F=T&],
developing its mail-in voting program for four key electoral states:
Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Arizona.

For Big Tech and state officials, questioning the wisdom of mail-in
voting was not allowed. On September 11, 2020, when JW’s Tom Fitton
made the common-sense observation on Twitter that “mailing 51
million ballots to those who haven’t asked for increases risk of
voter fraud and intimidation,” SKDK put him in its “misinformation
brief” to California election security officials.

(In January, Twitter suspended Tom for tweeting another common-sense
observation—“hydroxychloroquine is a safe drug”—a comment he
had several times earlier made on Twitter and which the tech giant
earlier had found not to be in violation of its rules. Read more on
the incident here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=21853&F=T&].)

California officials went after Tom again on September 24, falsely
stating that he claimed in a YouTube video that Democrats would
benefit from incorrect voter rolls and ballot collection. In the
video, in fact, Tom was updating viewers about Judicial Watch’s
highly successful, non-partisan lawsuit settlement with Los Angeles
County to clean up voter rolls. Judicial Watch is a national leader in
a non-partisan effort to clean up voter rolls
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=20872&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9iYWxsb3QtdXBkYXRlLWp1ZGljaWFsLXdhdGNoLWNsZWFucy11cC1kaXJ0eS12b3Rlci1yb2xscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MDcyMjUwNDM=].

California officials directly contacted YouTube complaining about the
Judicial Watch video. Three days later, the video was deleted from
YouTube.

In Iowa, Judicial Watch obtained 624 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22812&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2lvd2EtYmlnLXRlY2gtYXByaWwtMjAyMS1lcWNlMDg1OTczMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MDcyMjUwNDM=]
of
records revealing how state officials pressured Twitter and Facebook
to censor posts about the 2020 election. Included in the records were
emails pressing the companies to remove Judicial Watch posts.

The emails show how the state agency successfully worked with Facebook
to censor a Judicial Watch post about Iowa’s management of its voter
rolls:

An Iowa state official emailed Facebook official Rachel Holland
complaining that a Judicial Watch story on Iowa’s management of
voter rolls was “false.” (It wasn’t
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=18630&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaHMtY2FtcGFpZ24tZm9yLWNsZWFuLWVsZWN0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MDcyMjUwNDM=].)
The time stamp on the email is 5:19 p.m.

By 6:11 p.m., Facebook hit back. Facebook factcheckers “have rated
this content false,” Holland wrote the Iowa official, “and we have
applied a filter over this content warning users.”

Read more on Judicial Watch’s Iowa case here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22818&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmlnLXRlY2gtaW93YS1vZmZpY2lhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTA3MjI1MDQz].

Read more on the California case here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22760&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2Etc3RhdGUtb2ZmaWNpYWxzLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUwNzIyNTA0Mw==].

Of course it’s not just Judicial Watch in the crosshairs of
companies like Twitter, YouTube, and Facebook. On Wednesday, Facebook
moved to continue its ban on Donald Trump, now a private citizen.
Judicial Watch has argued that the ban is an affront to First
Amendment protections
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22831&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3RhdGVtZW50LWZiLW92ZXJzaWdodC1ib2FyZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MDcyMjUwNDM=]
of
free speech, peaceable assembly, and the right to petition the
government.

It’s also an ominous sign that Big Tech censorship is growing—and
growing bolder. “If they can ban President Trump,” warned House
Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy, “all conservative voices could be
next.”

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS OF BIDEN DOGS AFTER BITING INCIDENTS

On March 9, 2021, the White House
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22823&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvYmlkZW5zLWRvZy1pbmp1cmVkLXNvbWVvbmUtd2hpdGUtaG91c2UtcHNha2k/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MDcyMjUwNDM=]
confirmed
that President Biden’s dog Major, an adopted German Shepherd, “did
in fact bite someone at the White House, causing a “minor
injury.” Press secretary Jen Psaki said the dogs, “are still
getting acclimated and accustomed to their new surroundings and new
people.”

On March 30, 2021, the White House
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22824&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvYmlkZW5zLWRvZy1tYWpvci1iaXRlcy13aGl0ZS1ob3VzZS1lbXBsb3llZT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUwNzIyNTA0Mw==]
reported
that, “President Biden’s dog Major on Monday afternoon bit another
employee, who then required medical attention.” The encounter
reportedly took place on the White House South Lawn Monday, March 29.

Americans are understandably curious, and we filed a Freedom of
Information Act (FOIA) suit against the Department of Homeland
Security for communication between Secret Service officials assigned
to the White House regarding the Biden family dogs (_Judicial Watch v.
U.S. Department of Homeland Security
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53642&L=22845&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWJpZGVuLWRvZ3MtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxMTk0L11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTA3MjI1MDQz
(No.
1:21-cv-01194)).

We sued after the Secret Service failed to process records in a timely
manner in response to a March 10, 2021, FOIA request seeking:

All records of communications between USSS officials responsible for
protection at the White House regarding the Biden family dogs, named
Champ and Major.
On April 12, 2021, the Secret Service replied to Judicial Watch’s
FOIA request saying that they had identified responsive records which
were being processed but have yet to produce them.

The public has a right to know the details about any incident in which
Secret Service personnel were injured by President Biden’s dog. We
have no doubt that Major and Champ are good dogs but politicians and
bureaucrats can’t be trusted to tell us everything.

clean_body: Judicial Watch SUES over Biden Border Crisis! [INSIDE JW] NEW: IOWA GOV’T OFFICIALS COORDINATED WITH BIG TECH TO CENSOR JUDICIAL WATCH ELECTION POSTS [==] Last week we released [==] records from the Secretary of State of California revealing how state officials pressured social media companies (Twitter, Facebook, Google (YouTube)) to censor election posts. Included were “misinformation briefing” emails compiled by communications firm SKDK, which lists [==] Biden for President as its top client [==] of 2020. The state agency successfully pressured YouTube to censor a Judicial Watch video concerning vote by mail and a Judicial Watch lawsuit settlement about California voter roll clean up. It turns out that California wasn’t the only state acting in seeming violation of the First Amendment. The new information from Iowa revealed below exposes the dirty details of the expanding conspiracy against free expression. We received 624 pages [=] of records from the Secretary of State of Iowa showing how state officials pressured social media companies Twitter and Facebook to censor posts about the 2020 election. Included in these records were emails from Iowa state officials to representatives of Big Tech pressuring these companies to remove some of Judicial Watch’s posts. The emails show how the state agency successfully pressured Facebook to censor our post about Iowa’s management of its voter rolls. We received the records as a result of a June 2020 Iowa Open Records lawsuit filed after the Iowa Secretary of State failed to comply with our February 2020 request for records and communications about a Judicial Watch report [] regarding the accuracy of the state’s voter registration rolls (Judicial Watch v. Iowa Secretary of State [=] (No. 05771 EQCE085973)). We were represented by Iowa lawyer Alan R. Ostergren of Des Moines, Iowa. The records show that officials in the Secretary of State’s office on multiple occasions contacted officials from Facebook and Twitter to try to have these companies remove Judicial Watch posts that raised concerns [=] about Iowa’s failure to maintain accurate election rolls. On February 3, 2020, at 5:19 p.m., Kevin Hall, the communications director for the Iowa Secretary of State, wrote in a February 3, 2020, email [==] to Facebook official Rachel Holland: Rachel, We’ve been playing whack-a-mole with this false story all day. Is there anything you can do to help: [likely =] We’ve told them is fake. They have it PINNED to the top of their page. Here’s our rebuttal: = Holland responded at 6:11p.m., writing: Hi Kevin, Circling back with an update regarding the content posted by Judicial Watch. Our third-party fact checkers have rated this content false, and we have applied a filter over the content warning users before they click to see it that the content has been rated false by independent fact checkers. Please continue to report violating content to us by emailing reports@content.facebook.com, and copying me (RachelHolland@fb.com), as I will be on an airplane for the next couple hours. Let me know if you have any questions or concerns regarding this or any other matters. A couple of hours later, Hall followed up, “Thank you! They have new posts up, doubling down on the false claims.” And Holland responded, “Thanks for flagging- we’ve got a full team with eyes on this now and are applying the false filter to similar articles as well. I’ll send you an additional update shortly!” That same day, Hall and Maria Benson, the director of communications at the National Association of Secretaries of State, both tried to convince [==] Twitter to censor Judicial Watch’s posts but were ultimately unsuccessful. Hall filed a report with Twitter, and Benson escalated it by looping in Kevin Kane from Twitter. On February 3, 2020, Benson wrote, “Iowa Secretary of State has reported the below election misinformation, but Twitter has declined to take it down. As you can see from the facts the tweets are clearly wrong. I wanted to bring this to your attention to hopefully remedy the situation. I’ve cc’d Kevin Hall, their Communicators Director.” Kane responded rejecting the request saying, “Thanks Maria – This was reviewed by our team and is not in violation of our election integrity policy as it does not suppress voter turnout or mislead people about when. where. or how to vote. I understand this is not the outcome you are seeking and appreciate you continuing to report Tweets to our team.” In an email the next day, Hall wrote to Kane saying, “Facebook, thankfully, was helpful. I would suggest perhaps reviewing your policies at Twitter and putting them more in line with what Facebook is doing to counter election misinformation.” After being rejected by Twitter, Benson emailed Brian Scully, an official at the Department of Homeland Security’s Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency, writing on February 3, 2020: Hey Brian, Can you report this as well? Hannity is now retweeting and Twitter isn’t playing ball with us. I’ve cc’d Kevin Hall who you met Saturday. He’s IA SOS’s Communications Director. He’s been reporting and playing wack a mole by trying to reply to misleading tweets. Scully responded promising to contact Twitter. “Sorry ... been out of pocket a bit. Will reach out to Twitter. Let me know if you get something.” These records are yet another example of state officials conspiring with Big Tech to deny Americans their First Amendment rights. These records further show that Big Tech censorship is a government scandal: Iowa government officials worked with Facebook to remove posts they did not like, and Facebook bowed to this political pressure immediately. It should be disturbing to all Americans that government officials are working to censor speech they disagree with and that these behemoth companies often seem willing to roll over and censor free speech. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES OVER ABUSE OF CHILDREN TIED TO BIDEN BORDER CRISIS Little children are in trouble on the border. Texas welfare officials received three reports of abuse and neglect at the Freeman Coliseum in San Antonio, where more than 1,300 migrant children reportedly [] had been held. The site is one of several [=] set up to handle the recent surge. This came on the heels of claims [=] that multiple facilities where children are being held are unsafe. To dig into this, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit against the Department of Health and Human Services for records about assaults on and abuse of unaccompanied alien children (UAC) in HHS custody (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services [==] (No. 1:21-cv-01190)). We sued after the HHS denied our February 26, 2021, FOIA request for: All summaries from individual case files of reports of physical and/or sexual abuse or assault of Unaccompanied Alien Children under the care of HHS, its sub-agencies, and or volunteer agencies, contractors, grantees, and sub-grantees, to include all segregable, non-exempt information. Records reflecting aggregated data of physical and/or sexual abuse and assault of UACs under the care of HHS, its sub-agencies, and or volunteer agencies, contractors, grantees, and sub-grantees. We are concerned that the surge of migrants seeking to take advantage of the Biden administration’s lax immigration policies has resulted in the foreseeable abuse of children, as overwhelmed federal authorities are ill-equipped to handle the huge number of children crossing the border. The unprecedented secrecy and censorship surrounding these sites compounds the problem and limits accountability. Our lawsuit aims to expose the full truth about this particularly troubling consequence of the Biden administration’s lawlessness on immigration. This is not a new problem. We uncovered [=] HHS records in July 2018 revealing that in multiple cases, unaccompanied alien children (UACs) processed during the Obama administration were assaulted by government employees. We began investigating [] this matter in 2014 when a wave of UACs swamped the southwest border. Since that time, we have been investigating incidents of violence, drug trafficking, human trafficking, and other criminal activities, as well as whether migrant children were being abused while in U.S. shelters. FACEBOOK’S BRAZEN BAN OF PRESIDENT TRUMP SHOULD CONCERN EVERY AMERICAN The Facebook Oversight Board’s decision upholding President Trump’s Facebook ban undermines the First Amendment and free speech. The brazen ban of President Trump is already chilling the speech of other Facebook users and Internet users generally, who fairly worry about Facebook and Big Tech censoring and deplatforming them. I have been personally locked out of Twitter for four months over a tweet previously found not to be in violation [] of Twitter’s rules. Judicial Watch previously argued [=] that Facebook’s Oversight Board should have reversed the president’s ban because the ban is an affront to First Amendment protections of free speech, peaceable assembly, and the right to petition the government. There is no credible evidence that President Trump either morally or legally incited violence. He was resoundingly acquitted by the United States Senate after the impeachment “prosecutors” failed to produce credible evidence he incited violence. For Facebook and its Oversight Board to suggest President Trump incited violence and that complaints about the administration of an election could incite violence is a political position aligned with the Left and political opponents of President Trump and his supporters. JUDICIAL WATCH REVEALS CENSORED HISTORY OF 2020 ELECTION We continue to investigate the serious questions concerning the 2020 election. Our chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison, summarizes [=] our efforts in his Investigative Bulletin [== Judicial Watch has uncovered critical new details in the secret history of the 2020 election: how state government officials—at times interfacing with the Biden presidential campaign—colluded with Twitter, Facebook, and YouTube to censor freedom of speech. The new information raises enormous constitutional and legal questions. It challenges the conventional wisdom that the companies are operating solely as private actors and can remove or ban users of their services as they see fit, with no violation of First Amendment rights. The new documents “suggest a conspiracy against the First Amendment rights of Americans,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “These documents blow up the big lie that Big Tech censorship is ‘private’—as the documents show collusion between a whole group of government officials in multiple states to suppress speech about election controversies.” In California, we obtained more than 500 pages of documents [=] showing how a state agency, the Office of Election Cybersecurity, tracked social media commentary and pushed Big Tech to take down posts. Included in the documents were so-called “Misinformation Daily Briefings” from the communications firm SKDK. The firm also was deeply involved in the Biden presidential campaign [], developing its mail-in voting program for four key electoral states: Pennsylvania, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Arizona. For Big Tech and state officials, questioning the wisdom of mail-in voting was not allowed. On September 11, 2020, when JW’s Tom Fitton made the common-sense observation on Twitter that “mailing 51 million ballots to those who haven’t asked for increases risk of voter fraud and intimidation,” SKDK put him in its “misinformation brief” to California election security officials. (In January, Twitter suspended Tom for tweeting another common-sense observation—“hydroxychloroquine is a safe drug”—a comment he had several times earlier made on Twitter and which the tech giant earlier had found not to be in violation of its rules. Read more on the incident here [].) California officials went after Tom again on September 24, falsely stating that he claimed in a YouTube video that Democrats would benefit from incorrect voter rolls and ballot collection. In the video, in fact, Tom was updating viewers about Judicial Watch’s highly successful, non-partisan lawsuit settlement with Los Angeles County to clean up voter rolls. Judicial Watch is a national leader in a non-partisan effort to clean up voter rolls [=]. California officials directly contacted YouTube complaining about the Judicial Watch video. Three days later, the video was deleted from YouTube. In Iowa, Judicial Watch obtained 624 pages [=] of records revealing how state officials pressured Twitter and Facebook to censor posts about the 2020 election. Included in the records were emails pressing the companies to remove Judicial Watch posts. The emails show how the state agency successfully worked with Facebook to censor a Judicial Watch post about Iowa’s management of its voter rolls: An Iowa state official emailed Facebook official Rachel Holland complaining that a Judicial Watch story on Iowa’s management of voter rolls was “false.” (It wasn’t [=].) The time stamp on the email is 5:19 p.m. By 6:11 p.m., Facebook hit back. Facebook factcheckers “have rated this content false,” Holland wrote the Iowa official, “and we have applied a filter over this content warning users.” Read more on Judicial Watch’s Iowa case here []. Read more on the California case here [==]. Of course it’s not just Judicial Watch in the crosshairs of companies like Twitter, YouTube, and Facebook. On Wednesday, Facebook moved to continue its ban on Donald Trump, now a private citizen. Judicial Watch has argued that the ban is an affront to First Amendment protections [=] of free speech, peaceable assembly, and the right to petition the government. It’s also an ominous sign that Big Tech censorship is growing—and growing bolder. “If they can ban President Trump,” warned House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy, “all conservative voices could be next.” JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS OF BIDEN DOGS AFTER BITING INCIDENTS On March 9, 2021, the White House [=] confirmed that President Biden’s dog Major, an adopted German Shepherd, “did in fact bite someone at the White House, causing a “minor injury.” Press secretary Jen Psaki said the dogs, “are still getting acclimated and accustomed to their new surroundings and new people.” On March 30, 2021, the White House [==] reported that, “President Biden’s dog Major on Monday afternoon bit another employee, who then required medical attention.” The encounter reportedly took place on the White House South Lawn Monday, March 29. Americans are understandably curious, and we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit against the Department of Homeland Security for communication between Secret Service officials assigned to the White House regarding the Biden family dogs (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [ (No. 1:21-cv-01194)). We sued after the Secret Service failed to process records in a timely manner in response to a March 10, 2021, FOIA request seeking: All records of communications between USSS officials responsible for protection at the White House regarding the Biden family dogs, named Champ and Major. On April 12, 2021, the Secret Service replied to Judicial Watch’s FOIA request saying that they had identified responsive records which were being processed but have yet to produce them. The public has a right to know the details about any incident in which Secret Service personnel were injured by President Biden’s dog. We have no doubt that Major and Champ are good dogs but politicians and bureaucrats can’t be trusted to tell us everything. Until next week ...
